entry.title: About
entry.content:
• English
  • PT-BR

Introduction

Hello I'm lukas!! And this is my translation blog! I mainly fan-translate enstars!

To check my translations, please check my Translation Masterlist!

Translation Bias

I will mainly translate content from:
  • Double Face
  • Valkyrie
  • MaM

    • I will sometimes translate content from:
  • Switch
  • ALKALOID
  • RYUSEITAI

    • Thanks and Credits

    Thank you to Ren who customized the NexT theme for Hexo and made it look pretty and good for enstars translators! Thank you to citrinesea who helped me with setting up the site, and for sharing their template for song posts! Thank you to 310mc who helped me when I needed setting up my masterlist! And lastly, thank you yuu for making the whole translation masterlist template!!

    Introdução

    Olá, Eu sou o lukas!! E esse é o meu blog de tradução! Eu faço principalmente, traduções de enstars!

    Pra checar minhas traduções, por favor cheque a minha Masterlist de Traduções!

    Viés de Tradução

    Eu vou principalmente traduzir histórias relacionadas a:
  • Double Face
  • Valkyrie
  • MaM

    • E somente algumas vezes de:
  • Switch
  • ALKALOID
  • RYUSEITAI

    • Obrigado e Créditos

    Obrigado ao Ren que customizou esse tema de NexT inteiro pra Hexo e fez ficar bom e bonito para traduções de Enstars! Obrigado ao citrinesea que me ajudou a setar e fazer esse site funcionar, e por compartilhar o seu template pra músicas! Obrigado ao 310mc, por elu ter me ajudado a fazer a minha masterlist, e ter ajudado ela a funcionar! E por último, obrigadoa o yuu por fazer o template da masterlist!!

entry.title: Translation Masterlist
entry.content:
• English
  • PT-BR

Terms of Service (Proofread)

Please, before checking my translations, read my terms of service!

I permit:

  • Publishing screenshots of my translations
  • Re-translating my translations to a different language, but please contact me in Twitter/X (koou210), or in my Discord (koou21)
  • Using my translations for Youtube Videos, but of course giving me the credits
  • Using my translations in Fanworks, Quotebooks, but please give me the credit
  • Using my translations on public/private masterlists

I do not permit:


  • Making any tip of profit with my translations
  • Re-publishing the enterity of a translaion in other places, without my previous agreement
  • Train any type of AI with my translations
  • Changing the meaning/intention in my translations

Terms of Service (Non-Proofread)

I permit:

  • Publishing screenshots of my translations, but you’ll need to give me the credits.
  • Using my translations for Youtube Videos, but of course giving me the credits. You’ll need to inform somewhere that it wasn’t proofread
  • Using my translations in Fanworks, Quotebooks, but please give me the credit. You’ll also need to inform somewhere that it wasn’t proofread
  • Using my translations on public/private masterlists

I do not permit:


  • Doing anything stated before without the previous explained condition


    The Non-Proofread TOS only applies to stories (in English) published after January 27, 2026.

Masterlist

Currently Working

Neverland
Orbit
Ballade of the Lost Ones
Valkyrie Anniversary Mini Talks

!!-Era

Main Story

Metamorphose

Event Stories

Neverland

Scout Stories

Shoe Sores and Aching Muscles

Are You Good at Streaming?

Special Stories

Birthday Stories

Shu Birthday 2024

Other Stories

Valkyrie Anniversary Mini Talks

Song Lyrics

Stippling
Sleeper Mystery Train

!-Era

Management Stories

Shu Management Story - 4

Termos de Serviço (Revisado)

Por favor, antes de ler minhas traduções, leia meus termos de serviço!

Eu permito:

  • Publicar capturas de tela (prints) das minhas traduções
  • Re-traduzir uma história minha para outra língua, mas por favor me contate no meu Twitter/X (koou210), ou no meu Discord (koou21)
  • Usar minhas traduções para vídeos no YouTube, mas por favor me dê os créditos
  • Usar minhas traduções para Fanworks, Quotebooks, mas por favor me dê os créditos
  • Usar minhas traduções em masterlists públicas/privadas

Eu não permito:


  • Ganhar qualquer tipo de dinheiro a partir das minhas traduções
  • Re-publicar a interiedade das minhas traduções em outro lugar, sem o meu consentimento anterior
  • Treinar qualquer tipo de I.A. com as minhas traduções
  • Mudar a intenção e signficado claro nas minhas traduções

Termos de Serviço (Não Revisado)

Eu permito:

  • Publicar capturas de tela (prints) das minhas traduções, mas por favor me dê os créditos
  • Usar minhas traduções para vídeos no YouTube, mas por favor me dê os créditos. Você precisará informar em algum lugar que não foi revisado
  • sar minhas traduções par Fanworks, Quotebooks, mas por favor me dê os créditos. Você precisará informar em algum lugar que não foi revisado
  • Usar minhas traduções em masterlists públicas/privadas

Eu não permito:


  • Fazer qualquer coisa previamente mencionada, sem a condição citada


    Os termos de serviço para histórias não revisadas (em português), só se aplicam em histórias a partir do dia 16 de Julho de 2026

Masterlist

entry.title: Perfect Sundae
entry.content:
Perfect Sundae
Start Reading
Kaoru is feeling down after seeing the Producer chat away happily in a cafe. His feelings of love waver with the appearance of an unforeseen rival, but...
Season
Summer (August; ESY2)
Chapters
6
Writer
Happy Elements Staff
Characters
Translator
citrinesea (Kaoru, Ibuki, Adonis, Rei), lukas (Kohaku, Shu, Koga)
Proofreader
mika_enstars, citrinesea
Extra Information
Scout
Scout! Perfect Sundae
  • Grasping for the Right Words 1 2 3 4 5 6

Grasping for the Right Words 1

ES’s second year of establishment, August. UNDEAD’s dorm in the Star House.

Hey! What the hell’s the meaning of this!?

… Wh— Huh? Where’s Hakaze-senpai?

You’re finally here, hm, Koga? You’re awfully late.

Hakaze-senpai still hasn’t arrived yet. We do not know why he called us here either.

What the… He texted us, “There’s been an emergency! Everyone meet up in the room right away!” so I hauled ass over here.

I did too. What could have happened to Senpai?

Hmm… Perhaps… Could it be that the MEGA SPHERE 2 has finally emerged from outer space and abducted him?

Or perhaps he discovered some bigger, grander secret of this MEGA SPHERE, and is being pursued… ♪

What? That sounds very grave. We need to go find Hakaze-senpai right away—

Hold on, hold on. Don’t launch people off into space because you feel like it~? I’m happy you guys are having a good time, though.

Ku-ku-ku, I apologize that Adonis-kun and I just get along so well ♪

… (Getting his head pet.)

Hey! You bastards, you should pay attention and actually listen! Since he came through the trouble of getting us all here, obviously it gotta be something real important related to UNDEAD, right? So, what’s this “emergency” you're talkin' about, Hakaze-senpai?

Right. So, here’s the thing–

Lately I’ve been seeing Anzu-chan and Kojika-san together a lot. What do you guys think?

Alrighty. Meeting over!

Hold on, hold on, hear me out!

Stop screwing around! I rushed my way over here ‘cuz you said it was some kinda emergency, and it was just some silly bullshit like that?!

I don’t think it’s silly at all. For me, this is the emergency to end all emergencies!

You’re probably just overthinking, you bastard. It’s probably nothing, they were probably just talkin’ about work or something.

No way. They seemed weirdly close.

Earlier, too. Kojika-san leaned in to whisper something in Anzu-chan’s ear, and she seemed to enjoy herself and laugh…

That definitely wasn’t work-related.

And this is Anzu-chan we’re talking about, you know? What could he have possibly said that was so funny…

…

…

Huh? Are any of you guys listening!? I thought you guys would have a little more sympathy for me.

Of course we’re listening. I think it is a good thing that Anzu is widening her circle of friends.

You’re a real great kid, Adonis-kun~

But no, that’s not it. If things keep going like this, Kojika-san might steal Anzu-chan away and take her to MELLOW DEAR US, right?

Try imagining it this way. Anzu-chan and Kojika-san hit it off…

And then she’s like, “I’ll be MELLOW DEAR US’s main producer from now on. Goodbye.”

Wouldn’t you hate it if she said something like that and ran off overseas?

Nahh, there’s no way that’d actually happen.

That is right, Anzu is not the kind of person to neglect her responsibilities like that.

Actually… this is about that, isn’t it? We’re having a love talk here, right?

If someone experienced with women can't figure out what to do here like you, there’s no way the rest of us are gonna have a clue. I think you came to the wrong guys for advice.

B-But~…

Now, Koga. There is no need to be so cold, now is there?

Kaoru has been so dedicated to his work lately, I think it’s nice for him to have a little excitement and commotion caused by matters of love like this again ♪

As your partner, I feel a little left behind over it too, but… Getting thrown around by love is exactly what youth is for. Worry over love to all your heart’s content.

Well, I’d like if you could spare us a scandal, though…♪

Uuu, of course I know to be careful.

Then in that case? Do you even have a chance with Young Lady Anzu in the first place?

Enough already! It was a mistake to ask you guys for advice…!

It’s okay, Hakaze-senpai. I am here for you.

You helped me by giving me plenty of advice when it came to the issues I had with my fiance.1

I’d like to repay that kindness. I will be the one to relieve your woes this time.

Uuu. Adonis-kun’s the only one who is willing to listen seriously to me like this.

So, what do you think is the best thing to do to keep Anzu-chan from being taken by Kojika-san?

Oh. So that is how you’re feeling… talking about “taking” and “being taken”...

I think it would be best if Hakaze-senpai and Anzu and Kojika-san were all to get along.

That should make Anzu happier too. That way, nobody will feel sad.

Huh… I see…

Hey, where do you think you’re going, Hakaze-senpai?

Thanks for listening to what I had to say, everyone. Sorry, but we’re splitting for the day…

Tchh. Same as ever, that guy is a total handful.

It seems we weren’t able to give Hakaze-senpai the answer he was wanting.

Hmm. There have been many occasions up until now where Kaoru-kun’s been upset and struck with jealousy, but…

There’s something about this time that feels a little different from all those times before, isn’t there?

Grasping for the Right Words 2

(Nobody understands how I feel…)

(Maybe it was a mistake to go to those three for advice, huh. I’ll figure it out by myself.)

(Huh? That’s rare. The living room is quiet.)

(There’s usually quite a few people here, but it looks like it’s just Itsuki-kun and Kohaku-kun today.)

(Kohaku-kun’s completely absorbed in some TV drama, and Itsuki-kun is… sewing, I guess?)

(That’s perfect. I’ll just sit down on that sofa and think through it carefully.)

(— Now then. Seriously, what should I do about this?)

(We’ve been surrounded by ES idols up until now, so I never expected anything to actually happen.)

(But then we came here, and Kojika-san and Anzu-chan got close so quickly.)

(Sigh)... (Did something happen between those two that I don’t know about?)

(No, Anzu-chan is a producer who’s known throughout the industry for her skills. She would have a wider social network than I do.)

(It’s honestly a miracle nothing’s happened until now. but… it’s definitely possible she could just click with someone… just like that.)

(At this rate, even if it’s not Kojika-san, she could just get swept off her feet by some rando that popped up out of nowhere.)

(... No, no. Anzu-chan’s very serious, so she wouldn’t get feelings for someone she has a work relationship with, would she?)

(That’s right. Before, she said, “I’ll build bonds as colleagues, but I’m avoiding anything romantic.”)

(Yeah, it’ll definitely be alright. Even I have a hard time winning her over, so…)

(…)

(I wonder what kind of relationship Anzu-chan and I have had ever since the Repayment Festival.)

(Just when I thought that we parted ways cleanly, we met again so soon after. Then we did work together, went out places together…)

(I wonder what Anzu-chan thinks of me.)

(...)

(... I wonder if I’d know if I confessed to her…)

(— No! No, no, no! I definitely shouldn’t do that!)

(Anzu-chan and I are “idol” and “producer”. If I confessed and ruined the relationship we currently have, working together would become really hard.)

(It was awkward enough after the Repayment Festival. If I made our relationship more complicated, it’d just be the worst.)

(Besides, it’d just inconvenience everyone in UNDEAD if things between us got dicey…)

(I’d feel terrible inconveniencing them due to my personal feelings. Yeah, okay.)

— (Sigh) (The fact I’m bringing UNDEAD into this is pretty lame, isn’t it…?)

“Just go ahead and confess already!”

(Huh!?)

… (Watching the TV)

(Ahh, so that’s what it was. The drama Kohaku-kun’s watching?)

(Is it the one where the son of a Western confectionery shop and the daughter of a Japanese confectionery2 shop fall in love…? The show became a hit with its ostentatiousness and its pure romance, everyone’s been talking about it lately.)

“I’ve been waiting this whole time. Why won’t you confess to me?”

“Is it because I’m the daughter of a Japanese confectionary shop? Is it because I’m the type of girl to put youkan on my pancakes?”

(Kohaku-kun’s watching very earnestly. Must be really interesting, huh.)

“Didn’t you say we’d make the ultimate sundae together? Don’t give up just because we’ve hit a little bump in the road…”

“I’m sorry, it’s all my fault. I was threatened by those organization members… I got cold feet.”

“But now I know. It doesn’t matter who tries to get in my way. I’m in love with you! There’s no one else in this world I’d rather be with!”

“I’m so happy. I’m in love with you too!”

Wait, hold on, it shouldn’t be that easy! You’d be way more troubled over something like that, wouldn’t you!?

… What’s this all of a sudden?

Ya got some problem with the drama I’m watchin’?

No, sorry. It’s not that I had a problem with it.

It’s just… those two got together so fast, I was a little shocked is all…

That right? Ain’t that how it usually goes?

No, no. This guy’s way too brave. I don’t really get what was happening in the show, but some mysterious organization is trying to interfere between them, right?

Someone would be way more scared for their family’s sake and stuff, normally. There’s nothing you can really do about that difference in status.

If confessing your feelings to someone was this easy, I’d have done it ages ago.

Hmm, that right, huh?

Hm? “I’d have done it”…?

Oh-ho, does that mean you were goin’ to confess to someone?

Huh!? No, that’s not it!

Koh-Koh-Koh ♪ No need to hide it from me, I won’t tell anyone.

Well, why dontcha take a load off over here on the couch. I’ll listen to whatever ya need to say ♪

No, I just remembered I had something urgent I had to go do, so…!

There’s no need to run away like that. Despite how I look, I know a thing or two about romance ♪

I’ve been followin’ this drama for five seasons!

No, that’s…

C’mon, c’mon. Whoddya have feelin’s for? Out with it now, don't be shy ♪

Grasping for the Right Words 3

M~nn, I’m not so sure about going to you with this…

Why’s that? Are ya sayin’ I’m not up to the task? What, do ya think I’m a late bloomer or somethin’ when it comes to romance?

That’s not what I’m saying, but— Well, actually, do you have experience in matters of love, Kohaku-kun?

… Well, naturally. Even someone like me has had a romance before, no sweat.

I’ve gone out with all kindsa women in my time, ya see.

Uh… Let’s see. My first girlfriend was kind of an airhead, she was the daughter of a Japanese confenctionary shop owner. Her name was Anko…

— That’s the girl from the drama you were just watching, isn’t it?

Agh, fine! Ya got me! I don't got a lick about romance at all — not a single one! But, I just really wanted to try one of them there “love talks.”

It sure would be nice if ya could just tell me without bein’ a jerk. Who’s the person ya like?

She older? Younger? Do I know her? Ya can’t even tell me the first letter of her name?

You two are being quite nosy, so please quiet down! If you are seeking advice on romance, seek it elsewhere!

Who you have feelings for matters not, Hakaze. Frankly, the way someone confesses in a drama is equally insignificant!

What the… So you were eavesdroppin’ on us from the very start, weren’t ya?

“Eavesdropping”? How insolent. Your voices were so obnoxiously loud, they forced their way into my ears is all!

Sorry, Itsuki-kun~? I was already on my way out, so you guys can do whatever……

Hold your horses. You still haven’t said who your crush was yet!

At this point, it’s gonna keep me up at night not knowin’. Hear me? I ain’t lettin’ ya go no where ‘til you cough it up.

Itsuki-ku~un…

Hakaze. Cease with directing those eyes toward me as if seeking my assistance.

Shouldn’t sweet talk be your specialty? There’s no point in agonizing over it forever, so stop moping about and simply go convey your feelings to the person in question. You coward.

“Coward”!? I can say things properly when I have to! But it’s a whole different story when it comes to Anzu-chan!

Koh-Koh-Koh ♪ So that’s how it is! The one Hakaze-han's got the hots for was Anzu-han after all, huh?

Egh, why did I have to…

Ahh, whatever, screw it. I’ve already said it, so I’ll just skip straight to asking for the advice.

Just like you said, Kohaku-kun, I have feelings for Anzu-chan.

But lately, it seems like Anzu-chan’s been with Kojika-san quite a lot.

Everytime I see them together, my chest gets tight.

I hate it, seeing Anzu-chan smile at someone else.

… So. I was thinking of just going ahead and confessing to her, but it’s not as simple as it seems, you know?

… I’ve already kinda-sorta confessed to her before, so things are all the more complicated.3

It’s been weighing on my mind how I should make the next step with my relationship with Anzu-chan from here.

What do you two think?

…

…

Wh— What’s with you guys making such bewildered faces!?

I just... I didn't expect ya to be such a pure-hearted romantic. Just hearin' about it gets me all bashful over here.

H–Hold on, don’t you get embarrassed over it! You’re starting to make me embarrassed too!

I was by no means feeling ”embarrassed” over it. Rather, I was simply flabbergasted.

And here I thought you were the greatest flirt in the entire school. To think you'd be reduced to such a naive state over simply the little girl... it’s quite beyond my expectations.

I didn’t think I’d feel this way either, you know.

But… It’s just different with Anzu-chan.

Are those feelings of yours truly “love” in the first place?

All of us have been produced by the little girl for quite some time now.

Could you perhaps be merely mistaking your sense of gratitude and your respect for the work she’s done for romantic feelings?

That’s not it at all! I don’t think of Anzu-chan as my producer.

No, I should say, she’s not just a producer to me.

Of course, Anzu-chan’s been a tremendous help with my work up to this point, of course I think she’s a really amazing producer.

But.. Even if we hadn’t met as “producer” and “idol”, I think I still would have fallen in love with her.

... You’ve got nerves of steel bein' able to say stuff like that sober. Even a drunk Rinne-han wouldn't be able to pull that off, y'know?

(Sigh)... This is making me queasy.

As I just said, you'd be better off hurrying to deliver those lines to the person herself, rather than confess to us in a place like this.

If anything, one could even say it is the only remaining option that can truly define the nature of your relationship.

You say that so easily~ But I don't think you'd have it in you to confess if you were in my shoes, Itsuki-kun.

... You are mistaken. I always make a point to speak my mind.

Well, I reckon tellin' someone how ya feel to their face takes a whole lotta courage, though.

Even in the dramas I watch, they spend a whole season just gettin' to the confession. Isn't it normal for these things to take a while?

— Alrighty. Let's just bite the bullet here and contact Anzu-han so we can get that confession over with!

If you keep agonizin' over when to say it, it'll be a monkey on your back forever. If you just set a time and place to get it done, then you'll have no choice but to confess!

A wise decision. Otherwise, you would surely become a man spending eternity doing nothing but sitting on the corner of the sofa and muttering out all the ways you could confess to her.

Right then, fork over your Mega Phone, and I’ll type out the message for ya ♪

Huh? Hold on a second— You can’t do it on that short a notice!

Do not flee, you coward! Enough of this— hand that device over to us.

Just be a gooood boy and behave for a sec, ‘kay?

Stay back! Don’t you two get any closer—!

Uhh~hh, sorry if I’m interrupting~?

Did you guys do something to Anzu-neenee?

Grasping for the Right Words 4

Anzu-chan? I can’t really think of anything… or should I say, she never came in here, I guess?

Huh? Really?

I passed by Anzu-neenee just now, and it seemed like she was crying~ I thought for sure you guys were mean to her. So~rry~?

What? Anzu-chan was…?

I wonder what happened. Is she okay?

Knowing the little girl and how she is always working... Most likely, it was something to do with her job.

M~nn, I dunno if that’s the vibe I got from it, though…

You guys really don’t know anything? Neenee came running out from this room though~?

I genuinely have no clue. As if I would ever do anything to hurt Anzu-chan…

Well, no, I might have caused her grief before now.

But I didn’t do anything today, honest.

Is that so? Guess that might’ve been a misunderstanding on my part, huh~?

I was thinking you guys said something that set her off in some way or something~ My bad for suspecting you~

Not at all. We might’ve done something bad without us knowing.

True, but then again... All we were really doin’ was standin' here talkin' about Hakaze-han and Anzu-han.

... Hm? Did she catch us talkin' about how Hakaze-han was gonna ask her out?

Huh!?

Kakaka...♪ And so she hurried away with a tearful expression on her face.

To be driven to tears of shock just by the thought of your confession... It seems Hakaze is quite thoroughly detested by the little girl, then.

Hey, don’t say that…

What’s that~? Were you guys talking about love~?

You can tell meee, Hakaze-san. I might be able to figure out the reason Neenee was crying, after all~

… (Absolutely frozen still.)

Pull yourself together, Hakaze-han!

I'm sorry, okay? This was my fault. But listen— I really don't think someone like Anzu-han would ever actually hate anyone.

There's gotta be another reason. Somethin' to do with work or somethin’ that would've actually given Anzu-han a shock...

...

Ah! Wait... Do ya think maybe she heard what you said earlier, Hakaze-han?!

Yanno, that part where ya said you don't think of Anzu-han as your producer.

But when I said that, I just meant that I saw her as a girl and not just as my producer…

I see... However... If the little girl only heard the part where you said you don’t think of her as your producer, then the entire narrative changes, doesn’t it?

But… That’s not what I meant to say at all!

Even if you didn’t mean to say that, she wouldn’t know what you really meant as someone who just overheard it~

Ugh, god... This is the worst.

Why do things never go well between me and Anzu-chan? Ever.

Whatever, I have to clear up her misunderstanding!

Calm down, will ya? If you go runnin' to Anzu-han while you’re all panicked like that, you’re just gonna make things even more complicated.

Panicking’s not gonna change anything~ At times like this, “nankuru nai sa”4 is the way to go.

Now say it with me~ “Nankuru nai sa~”

Nankuru nai sa~…

What about this could possibly be nothing to worry about?

What should I do? At this rate, I might never get to confess.

But we don't even know where Anzu-han went off to, do we? I reckon searchin’ blindly won’t get us anywhere.

But…

Hakaze. When is your next scheduled meeting with the little girl?

Ummm… There’s a photoshoot gig at a restaurant tomorrow, but I think Anzu-chan had said she would be there too.

How perfectly convenient, in that case. Then you shall speak with the little girl during your break during that job.

By tomorrow morning, both of you will have had time to cool your heads, which will make it far easier for your true feelings to reach her.

Heh, I thought you were the kinda guy to blow his top at the drop of a hat. Sure didn’t expect hearin’ somethin’ like that from you.

How insolent! Even I am capable of learning and evolving, you know!

Ahh, it was a mistake to try sympathizing with Hakaze’s feelings! I shall now take my leave!

Wahh, sorry, sorry. I’ll apologize to Anzu-chan tomorrow like you said, Itsuki-kun.

That's right~ If it’s Neenee, she’ll totally understand~

Wait, I just got a great idea~♪

You don’t wanna make your relationship with Anzu-neenee even worse, right, Hakaze-san?

If that’s the case, I think we should run some kinda practice rehearsal on how to clear up the misunderstanding~

“Rehearsal”?

You heard me— We’re gonna act out the apology~♪

Grasping for the Right Words 5

A few minutes later.

Umm… Anzu-chan, about what I said to you yesterday…

…

C’mon, give him a reply!

… (Sigh). “I don’t want to see your face right now, Hakaze…-senpai. Go away.”

No, you’re misunderstanding. About that one thing, I wasn’t trying to say that I didn’t think of you as my producer Anzu-chan.

So, uh… What I meant to say was…

Oh-ho? So it’s you, huh? The one who made our Anzu-han cry?

Ya really think you’re gonna get away with pullin’ that? Depending on how ya apologize, your corpse’s gonna be floatin’ in the sea.

Meow~♪

Errr, what roles are you two supposed to be?

Enough, apologize to Anzu-han already, why dontcha!

… Right. Sorry, Anzu-chan.

I’ve really been reflecting on what I said and how it made you feel anxious. I used the wrong words completely.

I think you’re a really, really amazing producer, Anzu-chan. You’ve helped guide UNDEAD many times over up until now.

I don’t think there’s a single person among all the ES idols who doesn’t think of you as their producer…

Non! Stop fidgeting and letting your gaze wander about! Do not repeatedly shift your weight back and forth!

Meo~w ♪

Yeah, yeah, I get it.

You’ve already made our Anzu-han angry, you know? Did you think you would be forgiven with that kind of attitude? Huh?

If you have any regret, try showing it through your attitude first!

Mew, me~yow, mrrrrrrrp… ♪ (Purring)

Sorry, can we stop for a sec?

What is this? Even though we all are going along with this mock apology of yours…

I get what Itsuki-kun’s going for. He’s doing some kind of take on an angry Anzu-chan.

So… Kohaku-kun. Ibuki-kun. What the heck are you two supposed to be?

Having a friend like this that stands beside the heroine is a classic, isn't it? So I’m playin’ the role of her naggy bestie ♪

Wait, but none of them are ever that scary!? What kinda people does she have at her side!?

And Ibuki-kun, you’re not even a human anymore.

Hey, I wanted to be a human, ‘kay~?

But it looked like all the roles got taken up, so~ I went with being a rich housecat who’s kept at Oukawa-san’s home~

We definitely don’t need that role played here!

Huh~? Then what kinda role should I have, then? I can’t do something if you don’t tell me, you know~

Then, how about you take on the role of Kojika-san? That would make a good reference for Hakaze for the future, would it not?

Nyahaha. So I’m Hakaze-san’s rival for her love, huh~ That’s a real big promotion from housecat~

Well then, should I throw my arm around Itsuki-san’s shoulders? I could do without having to kiss him though, please!

This is already getting out of control… Are we going to get any actual practice out of this?

I don’t want Anzu-chan to hate me any more than she does, but…

Hm…

Well, it’ll probably be fine ♪

Now you’re definitely not taking this seriously, are you!?

Well, it is troublesome, after all. Whether you are liked or disliked by the little girl is of no concern to me, after all.

I don't feel that way, though~?

But now that we tried it, I understand~ There wasn’t really a point in doing this mock-apology!

But you’re the one who came up with the idea!?

We tried it, and now we know it’s pointless~ You might be better off just going for broke and seeing what happens~

Wait, no, I don’t wanna go for “broke” on anything!?

That is true. But tomorrow's gonna come no matter what, so there's no use worryin’ about it forever here.

I don’t think ya got anythin' to worry about, Hakaze-han, you were able to apologize properly. After that, your future self will figure out what to do next.

…

Speaking of, I came here to grab something to drink outta the kitchen~ We talked so much, now I’m extra thirsty~

In that case, I'll brew some tea. Why don’tcha relax with us too, Shu-han?

Hmph, in that case, I shall partake.

… (Sigh) Was anything even solved in the end here?

Grasping for the Right Words 6

The next day.

Next is a pose where I’m holding a glass, hm? Like this?

… (Holds the pose.)

(Anzu-chan is… Hm~mn, I don’t see her anywhere.)

(Even though usually, she watches the photoshoot the entire way through. I guess maybe I am being avoided…?)

(Yeah. That’s right. From Anzu-chan’s perspective, she thinks I don’t acknowledge her as a producer, so…)

(To her, she’d been suddenly betrayed, after she thought she had built a good relationship with me.)

… Huh!? Ah, sorry. We’re changing the pose now?

Of course, how about something like this?

(No good. I need to concentrate.)

(Anyways, I need to get this job finished quickly so I can clear up the misunderstanding…!)

A few hours later.

Good work everyone~

(Alrighty, I heard Anzu-chan’s voice somewhere… Ah, there she is!)

Yoo~hoo~ Anzu-chan, good work today.

So… today went smoothly, so that’s a relief. The photoshoot had a real great vibe, probably because all of the staff really got along.

And you were the one who arranged everything, right? That’s a producer for you alright. Ever so reliable ♪

Ah, hold on. Sorry, but that’s not what I wanted to tell you.

Anzu-chan. The reason you were avoiding me today was because you heard me say, “I don’t think of Anzu-chan as a producer” yesterday, wasn’t it?

… Yeah, I figured that was it. I’m really sorry about that.

But that’s not what I meant by it at all. The truth is, it’s because there was more to it than just that.

It’s true I don’t think of you as a producer, Anzu-chan.

But I don’t mean it in a way that I don’t recognize the work you’ve done.

If anything, I don’t think there’s a single producer out there who is as skilled as and who cares so genuinely about each and every one of their idols as you.

You’ve leant me, UNDEAD, and other idols your strength innumerable times up to now. I couldn’t not recognize you.

Um, so… that’s why… when it comes to Anzu-chan…

I was talking about how even when we set aside your role as my producer, you still are a cute, wonderful girl.

I’m not joking. I’ve always thought of you as cute, Anzu-chan.

Ahaha, sorry, sorry. Don’t turn away, okay? Face me again.

I’m sorry for saying something that made you uneasy, Anzu-chan. Did I get my feelings across okay?

… Okay. Judging by the look on your face, you look relieved. That’s good.

Heheh… ♪

Ah, no. Honestly speaking, it made me happy that you felt shocked when you thought I hated you.

… Ouch, ouch! Sorry, I got a little carried away.

— Yes. I’ll continue to rely on you. Producer ♪

… Come to think of it, we had a job here together back in the old days, didn’t we?

Do you remember too? The one where we shot the music video with RYUSEITAI and UNDEAD after StarFes.

I kinda feel like it’s fate that we could do a job in the same exact place.

Ah, I see. So you suggested this place because you knew it had a great atmosphere beforehand because of the music video shoot.

Yeah, this restaurant really does have a perfect atmosphere, doesn’t it?. It’d make the perfect spot for a date ♪

— Hey, Anzu-chan. If it’s alright…

Huh? You have plans to come here another time soon? And in your private time on top of that?

Oh, yeah. Last time it was supposed to be an end-of-the-year party Moricchi was hosting, but it ended up turning into work somewhat, didn’t it~

This is a real popular restaurant amongst girls. I bet you wanna just forget about work and go and enjoy yourself as a normal restaurant-goer for a while.

You’re having trouble deciding what to wear… you say?

I think anything would suit you, though, Anzu-chan. Well, if it’s a special occasion, you do wanna go and look your best, huh?

That’s right. If you want, I can help you choose ♪

Don’t be so reserved. What type of person are you going out with?

Isn’t it pretty trendy for girls to go out with matching outfits these days? So…

Huh? You’re going with Kojika-san…?

Why are you…

…

… Ah. N–No. It’s alright. I’m just a little surprised is all…

… Umm. So, you and Kojika-san are pretty friendly, huh?

Oh no, I’ve just seen you guys a few times together before, but I didn’t think it was anything that serious, I guess…

Oh, r-really? So you’ve gone together for tea several times already?

And so next, you said you’d do dinner. I see…

Really, so Kojika-san’s hobby is to go around to different cafes? I didn’t know that.

Going around drinking large drinks like that and such, huh? That’s a little unexpected, huh.

…

Huh? Oh, you’re right. Someone’s calling for you, aren’t they?

Hm? What was it I wanted to tell you earlier?

— No, it wasn’t anything important, so… Don’t worry about it.

Yeah, I’ll see you later. Have a good time with that dinner.

…

(... Alright, I think I managed to send her off like normal. I don’t think I was acting strange.)

(It seemed like she was really excited to go to dinner with Kojika-san.)

(If she’s happy, then that makes me happy too.)

(A smile best suits a girl… No, a smile best suits Anzu-chan perfectly.)

(If I care about Anzu-chan, I should send her off and let her go in a way where she can smile like that.)

(It’s not like I’m her boyfriend or anything, after all.)

(...)

(I know that.)

(I know that, but…)

(A murmur) — Don’t go.

Sorry, Anzu-chan. Break that promise.

(I want you to smile. But…)

(I just can’t stand to see you smile for anyone else.)

Anzu-chan. I…

— I’m in love with you.5

Translation Notes

  1. ↑ This occurs in Adonis's center story SWING NIGHT.
  2. ↑ Wagashi (和菓子; Japanese sweets) is traditional Japanese confectionery. While what is classified as wagashi can be broad (and can change), generally, they'r e sweets made before Western influence came to Japan. Wagashi is often served with green tea.
  3. ↑ This happened in the story Repayment Festival, where Kaoru does not directly confess to Anzu but does something similar.
  4. ↑ The short version of the full Okinawan saying まくとぅそーけーなんくるないさ (makutou so-ke- nankuru nai sa) “If you’ve done everything as honest as you can, it’ll all work itself somehow”. A loose interpretation of it is "no worries", which is likely what Shu interprets from it. I kept this in uchinaaguchi.
  5. ↑ To be specific, Kaoru says "君のことが好きなんだ" here.

entry.title: Are You Good at Streaming? - Shu Itsuki Idol Story
entry.content:
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
(Professional Finish) Shu Itsuki
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not proofread.
JP Name
配信はお上手？
Season: Summer
Location: Mega Sphere's Shared Space

Sigh, I'm worn out... I wonder if the bakery downstairs still has croissants for sale at this late hour...

Even though I was focused, working through both breakfast and lunch has left even someone as me worn out

If I had known it would be like this, I should have let Kagehira bring me lunch without hesitation

Oh? Who is over there...?

Alright everyone, it's about time to end the stream. Great work everyone, thanks for watchingg~!

Nagumo, I see. It looks like he was doing a live stream. Good grief, he certainly is energetic

...If I stand here, I might end up in the camera's field of view. I should leave at once

Oh? Nagumo's jacket is...

Phew, stream's over! I talked so much, I'm thirsty

Nagumo, do you have a moment? It's about your clothes, it appears the lining of your jacket's hem is fraying

Eh? Whoa, you're right! Wait, does that mean it was like that during the stream, too!

Ugh, that's a bit embarrassing. I wonder if everyone was just being polite and didn't say anything...

No, it is in a spot that one wouldn't notice with just a passing glance, so I doubt anyone even realized it

Itsuki-senpai, thank you for telling me. You really saved me!

Still, I was planning to keep using these practice clothes. I really messed 'em up, hehh…

Well, I guess even I can fix something like this... maybe? I'll give it a try for now

...Good grief, I have no choice if so

Ehh?

I am saying that I shall repair it for you. Now, stand right there at once

Eh, are you sure?

I always carry a compact sewing kit with me. Fixing a hem lining should be a simple enough task

Now, don't move. It's dangerous if the needle pricks you

A few minutes later

Ooh! So fast! So clean! It looks like a professional job!

Non! How rude. I am a professional artist!

Ah, sorry! But I just meant I'm that impressed!

I heard from Taishou that Itsuki-senpai were very good at sewing, but I didn't imagine you were this amazing!

Honestly, child... just what on earth did you do to get your clothes into such a ragged state? There were several other frayed spots as well

Hmm. Come to think of it, when I was practicing outside yesterday, I might have snagged my clothes on some kind of art object or statue

Good grief... Well, what's done is done

I was on my way to the bakery, so I shall take my leave now

Ossu! Thank you very much!

...Ah!

You are so noisy. What is it this time?

Sorry, Itsuki-senpai! I thought I'd turned off the stream camera, but it looks like I didn't actually turn it off...

It seems our entire interaction just now was broadcast to the whole world...!

What did you say...!?

Whoa, look at all these comments! "Amazing!" "I'm jealous of those skills!" "Itsuki-kun is so kind"

My fans are going wild! Oh, there's a comment asking "What are you going to buy at the bakery?"

What I choose to buy is my own business!

How did this happen...! I knew the camera was running in this room, but I never imagined it would cause such a stir

Itsuki! Thank you for taking care of our Nagumo!

Eh!? Morisawa-senpai, what are you doing here!?

I was watching Nagumo's stream from my room, and I saw your exchange with Itsuki! It was such a heartwarming interaction that I rushed over here without thinking!

Thank you, Itsuki! As expected, your sewing skills are truly reliable!

My hand hurts! Your handshake is far too powerful!

Whoa!? The comment section is blowing up even more!

"It's Chiaki-kun!" "Itsuki-kun is so cool!" The chat is moving so fast I can't keep up!

Itsuki-senpai, please teach me and the others how to sew next time!

Good grief…

This is exactly why I can never bring myself to like live streaming

Check Other Idol Stories!

Shoe Sores and Aching Muscles
Coffin Dilemma

entry.title: Valkyrie Anniversary Mini Talks
entry.content:
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
This post brings together every Valkyrie Anniversary Mini Talk!

5th Anniversary (2020)

The 5th Anniversary is themed “Walk with your smile.” This theme reflects the fact that it is the first anniversary following the first Big Update. In this context, it symbolizes that, despite everything that happened in the previous era, they will continue moving forward, accompanied by the Producer’s smile.

Each Mini Talk is named after the Unit's initial song, in this case is "Miwaku Geki."

For some reason, both the Mini Talk answers give the same response!

Miwaku Geki

Hehe, “Miwaku Geki” is real wonderful, isn’t it?

Bein’ controlled like Oshi-san’s marionette makes me feel so happy♪

Marionette?

Eeh, of course I’m human. That was just, ya know... a figure of speech or somethin’...

Honestly. If you call yourself even a bit of an artist, stand tall. Without confidence, you can’t create anything

Oh, well... Once the curtain rises, we will control the world

I’ll show the unrefined what the art truly is. Kakakaka!

Control?

Eeh, of course I’m human. That was just, ya know... a figure of speech or somethin’...

Honestly. If you call yourself even a bit of an artist, stand tall. Without confidence, you can’t create anything

Oh, well... Once the curtain rises, we will control the world

I’ll show the unrefined what the art truly is. Kakakaka!

6th Anniversary (2021)

The 6th Anniversary is themed “FUSIONIC STARS!!.” This theme reflects a concept named "Fusion" and other concept named "Rock". "Fusion" stands for fact that every unit would be getting a "Fusion Song" with other unit, mixing their styles and bringing a brand-new concept. Rock stands for the music style of the 6th Anniversary song, "FUSIONIC STARS!!", which is a Rock themed song.

×Valkyrie

Hmph. I simply can’t understand why we would have to sing something as barbaric as rock

Real? I kinda like it, thoughh~ It doesn’t feel all sweaty or overbearin’ or anythin’, and ’s a pretty good song, isn’t it?

Non! No matter how good the song is, I simply can’t welcome anything that’s rock

So you do admit it, then?

Well, I can’t give an unfair evaluation of the piece itself. A dishonest judgment is the enemy of art, after all

Oh, come onn~ Ya actually like it too, don’t ya, Oshi-san? Ya were hummin’ it unconsciously just a moment ago

Since we’re going to perform it, I simply don’t want to neglect our practice, it’s not like I’m just focusing on trivial things, Kagehira!

I believe rock is art, too

Hmm~ Yeah, the way ’s taken in so many different influences over time does feel kinda artistic

Honestly... You’re only getting better at running your mouth. Well, I suppose that interpretation works too

Whether it is a form of art or it is not is up to the performer. As always, let’s make a performance as Valkyrie always make, that exceeds all the expectations

7th Anniversary (2022)

The 7th Anniversary is themed “Surprising Thanks!!”. This theme draws inspiration from a casino concept and the lucky jackpot number “777.”

Like every anniversary song, it includes a special Music Version feature. In this case, the characters’ outfits change mid-song based on the roulette results.

Surprising Thanks!! Valkyrie

Honestly. As the other times, it’s quite noisy, isn’t it? Isn’t a casino just a place to satisfy one’s own desires?

Well, even themes we don’t usually tackle are fine, aren’t they? The costumes an all, it feels different from the usual Valkyrie, so it’s kinda refreshin’

Hmph. The costumes are fine, but I don’t want to do fan service for some “surprise” that Rei and the others are planning

Is that so...

..... (Wink)

Nyaaah!!! Oshi-san just winked!?

I would normally refuse cheap gimmicks like fan service, but precisely because we don’t usually do them, they have value as a “Surprise,” like Kagehira’s reaction just now… I can understand that, though

I believe your fans might want to see it

Yeahh, that’s right. They say joint projects help us make new discoveries beyond the boundaries of our agenciess, so we’ve got to take on new challenges too

Hmm… Maybe I should do somethin’ as well?

Even if you do it, I won’t forgive anything that makes Valkyrie lose its dignity. Well, a little hand‑waving is fine, though

entry.content:

ES Idol Song Season 1: Double Face

Madara With this wind that moves my paintbrush 00:21
Kohaku As I’m looking over this scenery 00:24
Kohaku Of a light crimson rain 00:29
All Is this world a stippling1 00:34
Madara Of drops of loneliness and moments that never overlap? 00:42
All And still, through your eyes 00:50
All Each color may just blend together into one 00:57

Kohaku The wind blows in this crevice 01:14

All While standing close 01:26
All Everyone wants to preserve their pieces 01:29

All Even though I collected many fragments 01:44

In this case, it’s even more special because “斑” (Madara) means “stippling,” which is also the title of the song. In the case of "琥珀" (Kohaku), the word means Amber.

entry.title: Metamorphose - Ark
entry.content:
This story is fully voiced in-game.
It's recommended to listen to the story in-game while reading!
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Season: Summer

Chapter 1

Time: One hour later
Location: At an airport near ES

...

Um, Anzu-san, what do you usually do on your days off?

"You already asked that"?

Then, maybe I'll try asking a different question—

What made you want to become a Producer, Anzu-san?

"You already asked that too"? S-sorry, Anzu-san. I can't even manage a proper interview—

P-please don't fire me…! I've only got three lives left, so just count that one as a near miss, okay?!

How's the documentary filming going, Tsuzura-kun?

The new project that's about to be announced is a massive one I've carefully nurtured myself

I'm counting on you to capture every moment of this new era idol project ♪

Y-yeah, I'll do my best—

The harder I try, the more I just spin my wheels and end up bothering Anzu-san though—

Uu… Just please don't fire me, okay…?

Fufu. That will depend on your efforts, so I won't promise anything

So then, what kinds of questions have you been asking?

L-like… hobbies, or how she spends her days off, maybe…?

I just want to get along with Anzu-san first, so I've been asking about whatever comes to mind—

Hm. This isn't a matchmaking meeting, it's work, you know. Are you really alright with that?

Anyway. I'd like both Anzu-chan and Tsuzura-kun to witness the moment the Four Kings of the Sky are formed

It's almost time to gather. The others should be arriving soon as well

Unfortunately, Itsuki-kun declined. But Rei-kun, who came early, will be followed by Rinne-kun and Mikejima-kun as well

Hm. I'm glad they're coming soon. I was left out in the cold and at a bit of a loss here

By the way… Tsuzura-kun, was it? Why are you holding hands so affectionately with young Anzu over there?

It looks like you've suddenly gotten quite close. Care to explain what's going on in detail?

Eh? Ah, s-sorry—

I've been clumsy since I was little, often getting separated from others, so I kind of developed this habit of grabbing the hand of whoever's nearby

Besides, when someone holds my hand, their pulse helps me calm down…♪

With their pulse…?

Hm. Being friendly isn't bad, but I'd say you're a bit too close for comfort

Anzu, I've told you before, you shouldn't get too comfortable with someone who isn't your lover

Oh? Compared to the old days at Yumenosaki, it's nothing worth worrying about, is it?

Well, times and positions have changed. We're respectable adults now, after all. Be careful not to let strange rumors spread

Y-yeah. Sorry, Anzu-san—

I'm glad you said you don't mind, but I'll try not to cling so much

It's a habit, so I might not be able to fix it right away—

Tsuzura-kun, you sometimes hold my hand too, don't you?

I take it as a sign of trust, so I don't mind. But suddenly grabbing someone's hand might startle them, so you need to be careful

R-really sorry…! Should I grovel on the floor too!?

How should I put it… you're quite an eccentric one

Fufu. His restlessness is a flaw, but he's still a promising talent

It would be a shame if his badge ran out of lives and he was dismissed under Thunderbolt's policy. I'd hope for leniency

Wah—ah…! Anything but that!

If I got fired from Thunderbolt, I'd be completely lost with nowhere to go…!

I didn't intend to make it such a big deal…

…Well then. Thanks to Tsuzura-kun's eccentricities, the topic drifted off track

Since you came early, Rei-kun, I'll share a bit with you

Though it's more idle talk than anything. But I'd like you to be aware of the sense of crisis I'm about to mention

Are you familiar with the unit I produce?

MELLOW DEAR US. Wasn't they your greatest masterpiece?

I sometimes go to Europe for family rituals, so I've heard of them

I wouldn't call myself a fan, but they're a unit that's made a vivid impression overseas, right?

They haven't really made it to Japan, right? It's mostly overseas info—

The idols of this country evolved in a different form than overseas idols. No one thought the two would intersect in the present age

It could be said domestic idols were enough to satisfy demand here. But now, information about overseas idols flows in. That's diversification

But surely they're not coming to invade Japan. What does MELLOW DEAR US have to do with this sense of crisis of yours?

I mean that such an invasion could indeed happen

Oh…?

In this modern age where people get what they want as they wish, I can't imagine them deliberately attempting cultural invasion—

Wasn't the cooperation between Thunderbolt and ES meant to prevent exactly that?

Yes. That was my intention too. But the audience will make more realistic choices

The reasons may vary, but the existence of idols supported simply because "they're from the same country" is unnatural in itself

Hm. Supporting not the idol themselves, but their nationality, isn't the essence of it

Even for UNDEAD, with Adonis-kun among us, that's not a mindset I can agree with

If there were an "Idol Japan Representative" or something, it might be a different story, though

Fufu. In that case, I'd prefer selection based on their base country, not just nationality

Anyway. You must grow in order to be chosen

My next plan—the Mega Sphere Project, is a completely different program from 4piece

MELLOW DEAR US was formed before the Mega Sphere Project

They didn't cross the straits, so they never brought foreign idol culture into this island nation

But once the Mega Sphere Project is launched, that barrier will be removed

The Mega Sphere Project is that much of a powerful substance

At the same time, the Mega Sphere Project is also a gospel bringing fruit to the relationship between idols and producers

Japanese idols, too, will be able to more easily cross the sea and expand overseas

I wanted to bring such a wonderful plan into this country as quickly as possible

Otherwise, we cannot stand against MELLOW DEAR US. Without it, we'd be trampled helplessly by yet-unseen talents from overseas

That's why I had no choice but to rush the plan into action

Before the idol industry of this country is destroyed

Chapter 2

The idol industry of this country will be destroyed…?

Kukuku. You're being rather pessimistic, aren't you, NiceP?

I don't know what this so-called Mega Sphere Project is, but we're not such a fragile bunch that we'd bow to outside pressure♪

Ohh, Rei-san, already jumping into a debate?

So, this is our first meeting, huh, NiceP?

I don't think I need to reintroduce myself, but, I'm Madara Mikejima of MaM. I'm honored beyond words to be invited here todayy♪

Not only is Anzu-san under your care, but also being recognized by a world-class producer. It's truly an honor—

But the real talk hasn't even started yet. Care to tell us what exactly you've brought us here for?

Rightt, Rinne-san?

Yeah. If word about your precious project leaked it'd ruin everything, sure, but keeping it a secret even from those involved? That's not impressive, y'know?

The new project's being announced in an hour, right? Meaning we've got no time left

No time for emotional reunions either. Hurry up and tell us what you're trying to pull here

Fufu. I'm well aware

First, take this device, the "Mega Phone"

Hm. Looks like any ordinary smartphone… and this is supposed to be something?

There's a more suitable place for explanations. I'll explain the Mega Phone once we're aboard the helicopter—

From now on, you three will take on the name of the "Three Demon Gods" and support the new program

The "Three Demon Gods"…? Not the "Three Eccentrics"?

Perhaps NiceP is imitating Tenshouin-kun's habit of dramatic naming

Me, Shinkai-kun, and Hibiki-kun… To bundle such strong personalities together, an ostentatious name is needed, after all

No, it's merely coincidence. I've heard of such a group existing at Yumenosaki Academy long ago, though

Originally, I intended for you to be called "The Four Kings of the Sky"

On the point of needing a grand name worthy of launching a new program, I find myself in agreement with Tenshouin-kun

However, since Itsuki-kun didn't join, only three of you are here. Thus, I had no choice but to compromise

"The Four Kings of the Sky" without four members would be a laughable failure, wouldn't it?

Hahaha! If that's all it is, then fine!

Honestly, having one of the Three Eccentrics join the "Three Demon Gods" sounds like an in-joke, doesn't it? If it were intentional, I'd want nothing to do with such a name

I don't care if we're the "Three Eccentrics" or the "Three Demon Gods"

More importantly, you've got a grand plan to match that grand name, yeah?

I'm getting bored already, so show us. Yoshihide-kuun?

Ahh. Naturally, that's my intention

Now then. Let's board the helicopter. You, the rebranded "Three Demon Gods," formerly the Four Kings of the Sky—

Waaaait just a second!!!!

Oh…? Himemiya-kun, why are you here?

What do you mean "why"?! You're starting a new project, aren't you?!

No way I could just sit still after that announcement! I was determined to track you down and negotiate my way into performing!!

Ugh, I'm exhausted! I didn't know the exact location, so I checked every single airport I could!!

...

Fufu. To think you'd figure out our location from that broadcast

Yes, very nice. Truly, perfectly nice...☆

That video wasn't so much a recruitment as it was a teaser. The project we're announcing will take place in the sky—hence this location

Eh? Then all my effort coming here was for nothing…!?

That's too cruel! After I searched so hard!

Calm yourself, Himemiya-kun. To be honest, I'm just as surprised

I never imagined someone would actually fly here in person just from a few hints

In fact, I was proceeding under the assumption the fourth member wouldn't come at all

But it seems I must revise that assumption. Himemiya-kun, with your arrival, the flow has changed

Your extraordinary initiative and ambition, yes, you're truly fitting for a new era of idols

Here and now, I declare the formation of the Four Kings of the Sky—with Himemiya-kun as the fourth!

Do you all agree?

U-umm…

Agree or not, we ain't been told jack to begin with. Adding one more guy doesn't change anything

Right. It was meant to be the Four Kings of the Sky anyway, so it's no problem

More importantly, let's hear about this new project. Deciding whether to accept the job or not can come after that

NiceP. What exactly are you plotting? What's the meaning of this phone you gave us? Isn't it about time you told us?

Fufu. I understand, Mikejima-kun

The explanation will be given aboard the helicopter. On our way to the destination, I'll tell you everything

Chapter 3

Location: In a Helicopter

Once again, thank you all for coming, members of the Four Kings of the Sky

From here, you'll be heading to a certain facility floating in the sky

Can you see that airship floating up ahead?

An airship...?

Could it be that thing peeking through the clouds?

Indeed. It's something that should be received with proper astonishment. It's not something we can show off lightly

To stay hidden, it's currently stationed far out over the sea. But in one hour, it will move above ES's airspace

In the sky...? Don't tell me we're going to be working inside that airship?

I can't really wrap my head around it. After all that big promotion, it just looks like you moved the stage to the sky

Even if we're filming a show there, wouldn't it just be like some "in the air" location shoot?

No. Once you know the truth, I'm sure you'll be astonished

Because that airship is so massive, it could fit several music domes inside it

Ahaha, come on, stop joking around♪

Teasing me won't work, you know. I've been involved in building "ATLANTIS" — a whole theme park!

There's no way a flying ship that huge could actually float! It's physically impossible!

Fufu. To me, it's far more surprising that conglomerate heirs and foundation members are all enthusiastically working as idols. Myself included, of course

Events often unfold in completely unexpected ways. That's both the fascination and absurdity of human endeavor

Thunderbolt is the world's largest comprehensive entertainment company. Naturally, it houses some of the world's top research divisions

When their technological prowess is united, all forms of entertainment technology are brought to completion — it may even look like technology from a distant utopia future

Tsuzura-kun. Could you show everyone that footage?

Y-Yeah! I've got everything ready! I've been holding my breath this whole time so I wouldn't mess it up...!

Uh, right! The video's all set, so I'll just play it, and—

What the hell... is this?

This is... an idol?

This is augmented reality — cutting-edge technology that will completely redefine the concept of a live performance forever

Perhaps you'd understand it better if I called it a "Transformation"

It's the same kind of surreal method that special-effect heroes use to enhance themselves, and now, it's become reality.

Hoo... So this is the technology you spoke of, the one that could spell the downfall of our nation's idols

If I recall, Aoba-kun was also studying augmented reality devices with a game company. So you're saying anyone could now wield their kind of "magic"?1

That's one way to interpret it, yes

However, that alone does not represent the entirety of the Mega Sphere. The "Transformation" only reaches perfection when combined with the "Mega Stream"

Until now, streamed concerts couldn't reproduce the essence of a live show, the ability to feel and transmit the audience's passion beyond the screen

But with the "Transformation" and the "Mega Stream", that sensation can be experienced through augmented reality as something nearly indistinguishable from the real thing

So what you're saying is, if overseas hopefuls like MELLOW DEAR US were to obtain such advanced technology, what would happen?

I doubt it would change everything at once, but even I can see that it would deal a heavy blow to our domestic idol industry

The overseas scene I've seen is way different from this. Even watching that footage, it feels like something out of a dream. Kinda hard to believe it's real

But since you went out of your way to call it "Transformation," that Mega Phone you gave us earlier, that's the device for it, huh?

Ahh. You were once a member of Ryuseitai2. I appreciate how quickly you grasp the idea of a "Transformation".

What I've given you is the crystallization of Thunderbolt's new technology — the Mega Phone

By possessing both the phone and the activation ring, the Sphere Ring, idols can transform and perform live shows with enhanced production effects

Something called Sphere Live, that is the new form of expression required for the idols of a new era

Gotcha. Including not just a smartphone but also a ring, that's a bit much, don't you think?

Well, since it's not a show made with merchandising in mind like a tokusatsu series, I'll assume it's just a matter of technical limitation

Hmm~ I don't really get it, but the Ryuseitai guys would probably understand it right away, huh?

Huh~ So Anzu kinda gets it too? Because Morisawa-senpai converted her to the tokusatsu side or something?

Anyway, Anzu doesn't have to babysit them like that. They always turn everything into a story about themselves

Seems that story is saving me this time, though. An old man like me can't quite keep up with all this...♪

Still, fascinating. From what I see, it seems one could display an even more advanced version of the "magic" that Aoba-kun and the others use

Once you start "transforming," I do wonder if it still qualifies as being an idol, but it's certainly worth seeing

Tools are merely tools. Even with this "Transformation," an idol's radiance will not be corrupted by its use

That's precisely why I've chosen to grant it to you first. Once idols wield this technology, the Sphere Live will belong to them alone

To be honest, I originally planned to launch Sphere Live in the United States. But through 4piece, my thoughts have changed

There are still countless promising idols in this country

To convey that charm to the world, simply singing and dancing isn't enough. The "Big Flow" is changing that much

I was able to witness firsthand the immense potential of this country's idols through 4piece

There's an even greater potential in this nation — the kind of talent that will dream and delight in a project like this

I wanted to launch a new project in the very place where I once stood on the dream stage as an idol myself. That desire took shape as the Mega Stream

Everyone. Will you join me in creating the future?

The idol of a new era. Let us define what that should be like

Chapter 4

I see. I get what Yoshihide-kun wants to do

But I still don't get the logic behind gatherin' us all here, y'know?

Something still doesn't sit right with you, Rinne-kun?

Talkin' about the lineup. You're tellin' us to ride some "Big Flow," yeah? But for that, you sure picked a bunch of weirdos with quirks all over the place

Like Mike-nekochan over there, he got all suspicious about me and Yoshihide-kun and even came all the way to meet me in person!

Who'd deliberately pick a bunch of walking fuses like that, huh?

Hahaha! It was faster than overthinkin' things, wasn't it?

Straight to the point! Simple methods work best!

Otherwise, I'd end up giving long-winded explanations like NiceP or Eichi-san, you see?

Talkin' about the lineup. You're tellin' us to ride some "Big Flow," yeah? But for that, you sure picked a bunch of weirdos with quirks all over the place

Like Mike-nekochan over there, he got all suspicious about me and Yoshihide-kun and even came all the way to meet me in person!

Who'd deliberately pick a bunch of walking fuses like that, huh?

What, are you saying you've got a problem with Eichi-sama?

Look in the mirror! You're the one who always makes things complicated!

I won't deny that Tenshouin-kun's stories tend to drag on

But Sakuma-senpai, you move at an old man's pace! Can you even cross a streetlight in time!?

Gyahaha♪ You said it, you said it♪

I mean, no one would think to gather these four together, right? Yoshihide-kun, you didn't just pick us at random, did ya?

Of course not. I made sure to look into each of you thoroughly

Each and every one of you isn't easy to handle. None of you joined the 4piece project, nor had a chance to work hand in hand with me

However, that hardly matters, I sense immense talent in all of you

As I said earlier, there are still unpolished gems of talent buried within this country

Rei-kun and Mikejima-kun, who've already shown glimpses of it overseas… Rinne-kun, whose growth has been remarkable… and Himemiya-kun—

You all possess the ability to lead others, perhaps one could call it a kind of charisma

Having you represent the new project was, naturally, the only choice

Hmph. You ignored me at first though, didn't you?

I apologize for that. I was originally selecting from the units that hadn't joined 4piece, so you were unfortunately left out of consideration

However, in the end, I'm glad you became one of the Four Kings of the Sky

Your initiative and deduction skills in seeking me out truly impressed me. I now believe Himemiya-kun is worthy of being a king aboard that airship

Ehehehe. As long as you appreciate me properly, I'll forgive you!

So easily swayed, Himemiya-kun

Anyway, who's that with Anzu-san?

We still haven't gotten an explanation about who he is, have we?

Ah, you don't really have to worry about me—

I'm just a behind-the-scenes staff member, here to cover the upcoming project. It'd actually be great if you could think of me like air, really!

I had been wondering myself. You've been near young Anzu for quite some time, so it's only natural to get suspicious

I missed the chance to introduce you earlier, but since you're behind the scenes, are you with the press, perhaps?

U-uhm…

That reaction suggests… not quite, but not entirely wrong either, hmm?

It may be rude to judge by appearances, but from your earlier demeanor and lack of confidence, you seem quite unreliable for someone involved in a NiceP led project, don't you think?

Ah, well, of course— I'm only twenty-four, still a newbie, you know!

Don't even look twenty-four, dude… you reek of low confidence, honestly

Hiii... I-I know that myself...!

All the ES idols just seem so mature, like… like they're not even the same species as me…!

They give off the aura of veterans who've crossed death's door countless times—

It's only natural. They're veterans who've weathered the stormy seas of the entertainment world

By contrast, you've only just joined Thunderbolt. That gap in experience is inevitable.

Allow me to introduce him. This is Tsuzura Chitose-kun, who's only recently joined Thunderbolt. He's accompanying us to film a documentary

In the capacity of assistant director, he's currently covering Anzu-chan's work

I see. Then he'll also be handling our filming, I take it?

Joining Thunderbolt and being entrusted by Nice P to handle the filming… that must mean he has some remarkable talent

He hasn't shown it yet, but… I'll be looking forward to seeing it…♪

Ah, that's… not really my part, actually—

I think the idols will probably be filmed in a different way entirely

Hmm…?

Fufufu. We'll discuss that in due time

Oh, don't mistake me for being secretive. I'll explain everything to the other idols soon enough, that's all

Now, look straight ahead. At last—our next stage has appeared

Whoa...! Everything just went pitch black!?

So enormous a flying ship… truly fearsome indeed.

And aboard it reign… the Four Kings of the Sky—

Honestly, I've got no clue what kinda work this is gonna turn out to be, huh?

But are you really cool with this, Mike-nekochan? You're basically fallin' under Yoshihide-kun's command, y'know?

You were all wary of him just a bit ago. What's with the change of heart?

If Anzu-san says it's fine, then it's fine by me. That's all there is to it.

Even if I refused, this airship's arrival couldn't be stopped anyway, could it?

In the end, whatever NiceP's plotting, I've got to stay close to Anzu-san. Otherwise, I'll just repeat what happened with Gatekeeper

Now then, everyone! We're finally arriving!

The Mega Sphere Project. From this moment on, we become witnesses to history

It's not every day in life that you get such a truly Nice experience, is it?

Chapter 5

Location: In front of the Sphere Live Stage

"Mega Sphere," heh... It's just too unreal. I still can't wrap my head around it

So we "transform" here and then start the live, right?

Indeed. NiceP will soon begin his explanation to the idols in ES

We shall transform at the signal and present our new selves to the world... that's how it shall go

However... I still haven't the faintest clue how to use this "Mega Phone" or "Sphere Ring"

Hmmm. I do not understand. Is there anyone well-versed in this?

Come on, get it together, Grandpa!

But honestly, it's kind of confusing, huh? You need both the "Mega Phone" and the "Sphere Ring" to transform, right?

Yeah. The ring seems to be for personal identification. If anyone could transform, it'd lose its charm, wouldn't it?

As proof befitting idols of a new era, we should treasure them

Since we're at it, let's do a final check. Open the app on the Mega Phone and hold your Sphere Ring over it

And just like that, the "transformation" outfit— the "Sphere Coord", will be equipped

Damn, you're just rollin' those fancy names off your tongue, huh?

Didn't think you'd be that much of a nerd, Mike-nekochan

I still call the latest game consoles "Famin". 'Cause I'm a mama!3

...Just kiddin'. I'm not as into tokusatsu as Chiaki-san, but I was part of Ryuseitai once. I've got some grasp of transformations

If you'd like, I could even come up with transformation catchphrases for everyone♪

Hmm. Then I shall entrust that to you, Mikejima-kun. I'm doubtful even about my grasp of smartphones, let alone new technology

If you wish, you could also step forward as the leader of the "Four Kings of the Sky"

Me, the leader? Hahaha, don't joke like that!

We're already doing something as wild as transforming. If I started calling myself the leader of the Four Kings of the Sky, they'd think I've lost my mind

Oh my, that's unexpected. The one called "Mama" is embarrassed to call himself a King of the Sky?

"Mama" is greater than any King of the Sky. It's way nicer to be called that, isn't it?

Is it!???

Don't know what you're goin' for, Mike-nekochan, but callin' yourself "Mama" sounds way crazier than "King of the Sky"

First off, bein' a Mama ain't something you can aim to be

Hahaha! I think Rinne-san just doesn't know the full extent of my Mama energy yet!

Look, Rei-san. Mama will teach you how to transform~♪

Babuu, babuu♪

Oh, geez... Is this really okay for the Four Kings of the Sky...?

Gyahaha♪ Lighten up, Uri-chan, takin' this too seriously'll only make ya nervous♪

I don't care about bein' some "King of the Sky" What matters is makin' noise and entertainin' people

That's what an idol is. Transform or not, that core doesn't change

Let's make the most outta this Mega Sphere Project, yeah?✩

Geez, they're all so selfish...!

Can we really become "new-era idols" like this...?

...But

A chance to be a pioneer of something new doesn't come often...

Hibiki-senpai bloomed so suddenly under NiceP's production...

Maybe... I'm about to witness a miracle moment like that myself. So—

—I'll do it. I'll transform

Sakuma-senpai, you ready? If you keep stalling, I'm pushing you off!

Kukuku. Even an immortal wouldn't survive being pushed from this height♪

Rest assured. Thanks to Mikejima-kun's lesson, I now understand it

The world is vast. While we single-mindedly expressed our songs and selves, others devoted themselves behind the scenes to making idols shine even brighter

Those who stand on stage and those who support from behind, it's no hierarchy. Both are equally human

Never did I think the two paths, once intertwined, would bring forth a future like this

And that's precisely what makes life so fascinating

Let us, transformed as we are, show this wonderful future to the world!

"Bright me up!! — Let that voice carry us!♪"

Location: Metamorphose Stage

"Alright! Our live show's finally beginning!"

"From now on, you'll be witnesses to history, don't even blink! Don't miss a single moment!"

"Kukuku... Through the stage equipment, the outside world is visible. ES idols, can you see us?"

"Oh? Was that Koga's voice I heard? He sounds quite furious"

"Hahaha, that's so like Rei-san"

"Bet the UNDEAD guys didn't expect Rei-san to just start calling himself one of the Four Kings of the Sky without warning"

"Hmph. Our bonds aren't so fragile as to crumble over something this trivial"

"Koga, your turn to experience transformation will come soon. Look forward to that day"

"Until then, watch and listen to our live, and enjoy this grand feast of the moment."

"Heh... I can't help but feel giddy, learning about this brand-new culture...♪"

Translation Notes

  1. ↑ Rei is probably referring to Shinsekai, the augmented reality game created by Switch, first presented in "Shinsekai". A fun fact it's that in "Phantom Airship", the stage that ALKALOID performs (Believe 4 leaves) is within the game created by Switch, and as Mega Sphere, is also an Airship.
  2. ↑ For those who might not know, in "Meteor Impact" it is revealed that Madara was a member of Ryuseitai, as Ryusei Purple.
  3. ↑ (In Japanese, "ファミン (Famin)" is a playful shortening of "ファミコン (Famicom)," the old name for the Nintendo Family Computer, Japan's version of the NES. When Madara says he still calls new consoles "Famin," he's joking about being old-fashioned, like someone's mom who still calls every game console a "Nintendo.")
