entry.title: Metamorphose - Eclosion
entry.content:
This story is fully voiced in-game.
It's recommended to listen to the story in-game while reading!
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Season: Summer

Chapter 1

The time goes back a few days. One day in late June

Today’s a long-awaited Eichi Day!1

It’s super rare for all four of us in fine to have the day off together~♪

Wataru

I don’t know if it was “KIRAKIRA” or “TEKATEKA,” but it sounds like you had a wonderful time in that unique unit. I heard you looked happier than you ever do in fine♪

Fufufu! Could it be jealousy, Eichi?

You’re the one who left the birdcage open. If you dislike me perching on other trees so much, perhaps you should have joined the Audition yourself?

...Wait, why’s it getting so tense!?

Hey Yuzuru~! Do something about this atmosphere!

Even if you say that to me...

Eichi-sama, Hibiki-sama. I don’t know what has transpired between you two, but please don’t make young master feel uncomfortable

Oh. My apologies, Tori, Yuzuru

I trusted Wataru and sent him off, but it seems I’m not handling the idea of this NiceP producing him as well as I thought

Oh my. That’s quite the bitter face you’re making, Eichi~ Today feels like the day spears might fall from the sky!

Spears aren’t gonna fall! You’re so dramatic

Oh? If you ask it of me, Hibiki Wataru can even make spears rain from above

And! Thanks to the guidance of that Nice fellow, I can now deliver an even more polished, splendid show!

I didn’t say you should actually do it!?

Wait, can NiceP’s coaching really change someone that much in just a few days?

Well, he is a world-class producer, so maybe that much is to be expected

I saw the “PIKAPIKA” video the other day. Hibiki-senpai, you were so amazing it made me a little jealous

The Nice Dream Units chosen in 4piece, every one of them was incredible

It really is a massive Audition program. I hate to admit it, but you can feel NiceP’s strength as a producer

I feel like I got to see a new side of Hibiki-senpai I didn’t know before

Fufu. Entering in honor of the princess’s will, I was terribly nervous. Did I manage to save a bit of face?

Liar~ You totally weren’t nervous! You were acting all carefree the whole time!

It was only at the very end that you finally got serious

I was only wearing a mask. I may not look it, but I’m delicate, you know☆

Setting Wataru’s nonsense aside, we’ve learned that fine still has much room to grow

In that sense, I’m grateful to 4piece. It let me witness Wataru’s evolution

If I could be greedy, I would’ve preferred to see that evolution within fine

Your words are dripping with poison, Eichi-sama

I didn’t mean it that way—or did I?

Look at that. The trending Nice Dream Unit video is playing all over the front page

You’re right! Hibiki-senpai is singing and dancing!

Fufu. I never thought 4piece would draw this much attention

“Attention, viewers of this broadcast! Pardon the interruption!”

Nngyo!?

What is that? A video hijack…!?

It appears so. They’ve swapped in some sort of Nice Dream Unit promotional video from somewhere

“Thanks to idols, staff, and of course you viewers, 4piece ended in great success, and I am truly grateful”

“At the same time, here in this country, I plan to launch a new joint project between Thunderbolt and ES”

“The announcement is scheduled three days from now, at 15:00 JST! Please look forward to it!”

What the heck… A new Thunderbolt and ES joint project…?

Eichi-sama, have you heard anything of this?

No. Thunderbolt and ES have a comprehensive contract. Within its terms, NiceP is granted discretion

That includes announcing and carrying out projects

We have no right to control his every move, nor does he need our permission each time

Eh? So NiceP can just do whatever he wants at ES for now?

Of course, we’re being compensated appropriately

And naturally, I didn’t agree to anything outrageous

As ES office heads, we retain the authority to keep our idols from participating in Thunderbolt’s projects

If NiceP ever acts against my ideals, against what suits ES, I won’t remain silent

Still, NiceP sure loves to pull annoying surprise announcements

Just because he’s from some huge overseas company, he thinks he can look down on us. Eichi-sama’s the one who’s built up ES till now, isn’t he?

(But)

(If NiceP is starting another project, that means I might have a chance too)

(A project that made Hibiki-senpai grow, a project even Eichi-sama envied—I could be part of it)

(I missed out when I withdrew back then)

(But if I get another chance—)

—Young master?

Ah, no! it’s nothing!

I just thought maybe that troublemaking producer is scheming up something flashy again?

Anyway, let’s go! It’d be a waste not to enjoy our precious day off, right?

Indeed. Let’s end the work talk here and savor this valuable holiday

After enduring the fierce Audition battles and wrapping up “PIKAPIKA” activities, now is the perfect time to stretch our wings

Soon enough, there will likely be new developments. For now, let the four of us here enjoy a peaceful, ordinary day together...☆

Chapter 2

At the same time, at the Cafe Cinnamon in the ES Bulding

(A new project to replace “4piece”, sure smells fishy to me)

(I hear Mr. Nice Arneb Thunder2, better known as “NiceP”─became a man of the hour starting with “4piece”, thanks to his earnest and gentlemanly conduct)

(Even if he moved his base overseas after retiring as an idol, it’s strange how domestic media ignored him for so long)

(It must have been the media pandering to this country’s idol industry. NiceP was on the verge of being forgotten at home)

(I only ever heard rumors while traveling overseas myself...)

(If I remember correctly, nowadays a unit called “Mellow Dear Us” is popular in his place?)

(A former super idol and now a world-class producer. He’s been active on all fronts, like the protagonist of a story)

(Am I just being twisted for finding something fishy in such a smooth-sailing path?)

(It began with reforming the “P-Association,” then bringing in Anzu-san, who’s highly trusted by idols, to hold the 4piece program. As a result, they’ve even infiltrated the depths of ES)

(Even if the other side has immense capital, Eichi-san and Ibara-san’s eyes can’t be so blind as to accept their invasion head-on)

(The ES executives understand the current situation and are letting it be)

(No, perhaps it’s better to say they can’t intervene)

(The people of this country have always admired foreign goods, but if uncritical praise goes too far, it becomes poison)

(I don’t know what Eichi-san and the others are doing behind the scenes. But maybe I should make some moves myself?)

(For example, what if I got in touch with someone who knew NiceP during his idol days?)

(Normally, they’d be around here一)

Sorry to keep you waiting~♪

I brought freshly baked pizza, so let’s eat it while it’s hot~♪

Rinne-han...... do ya even know what ya did?

一An unbelievable blunder. It wouldn’t be strange if you were forced to take responsibility?

Sorry! It was my bad! Just spare me the violence, seriously!

Ehh, eh. What’s going on!?

Rinne-kun being at fault is nothing new, but Cinnamon is a proper café, so don’t bring dangerous stuff up here!

It ain’t “as always.” But yeah, this time really was my mistake

?That’s rare? For Rinne-kun to apologize honestly

Naturally. Amagi didn’t even consider participating in 4piece

I heard from the deputy director. Cos Pro was preparing to take on the audition as an agency―

Yet only Valkyrie and Crazy:B didn’t even send a reply

Me and HiMERU-han couldn’ go either way, we had work

Still, ES and Thunderbolt joined hands to create a huge project, we could’ve at least mentioned it, don’t you think

Not conforming to the big current is Crazy:B’s virtue. But Amagi himself wouldn’t want to be left behind

Ohh. That’s nice of ya, Merumeru♪ You praising Crazy:B to my face, huh

Don’t joke around. Why didn’t Amagi mention “4piece”

There ain’t any hidden reason. This time it was just my poor judgment

You and Kohaku-chan seemed busy with PBB4, would you be interested in the Audition anyway?

I never planned on joining, and Niki’s juggling being a cook and idol. For us right now, it just didn’t seem that important

That’s a lie, the truth is, you’ve got some history with NiceP, don’t you?

Whoae!? Since when were you there!?

Jumping in from the side like that’s bad for my heart! At least say something if you’re there!

I was patiently watching! You all seemed to be having such an intense conversation, so I was observing♪

Pretty twisted of ya. Watching my disgrace on purpose like that

So? What is it, you want something with Kohaku-chan or what?

Kohaku-chan belongs to us, Crazy:B, ya know? If you want him back, you better show some proper sincerity?

Eh? who said I “belonged” to Crazy:B? This ain’ Hana Ichimonme3

Hahaha! You’re clearly trying to change the subject? Looks like you’ve got something on your mind, Rinne-san

From here on, I’ll be asking, no, interrogating you

And I want everyone here to act as witnesses

What’s with ya, Madara-han, making it sound so grand… Are ya saying Rinne-han did anything?

Oh, nothing serious. Nothing against the law, nothing against reason

A story the world has forgotten. I came to dig it up

Rinne-san. Back in your idol days, ya were in the same agency and debuted together as peers with NiceP, aka Yoshihide Sanda, weren’t you?

Can you tell me about that time in detail?

With NiceP, in the same agency…?

Wait, seriously, Rinne-kun!?

If I remember, Rinne-kun, you worked as a solo idol for a while, but you never really told me much about that, right?

Could it be you actually knew some huge name?

Now that it’s mentioned, you’re the same age. The timing and age fit, but to think you were that close...

Could that really be the reason you didn’t tell us about 4piece?

No it ain’t. Niki never cared about the industry from the start, and 4piece just happened

...Tch, wonder where you sniffed that out from

Finee. Wasn’t hiding it anyway. I’ll tell ya as much as ya want

Though it’s just some worthless tall tale, nothing worth digging up

Chapter 3

Yoshihide Sanda was a solo idol who debuted at the same time as me

Back then, I was just some punk who didn’t know jack about how the industry worked, running around the bottom rung with my first producer, AkanP

In contrast to the likes of us, Yoshihide-kun was on a winning streak from the moment he debuted

“Yoshihide-kun”? Sounds like you two were pretty close, heh?

He’s the one who came up to me saying, “Call me by my name,” that’s all

From his point of view, I was just a no-name rookie idol not even worth remembering. He probably doesn’t even remember me now

Not long after we both debuted, our group of newcomers got to stand on the same stage, kind of like a showcase for rookies

Even among all the others, Yoshihide-kun’s talent stood out

He must’ve known and loved idols way before I ever did

Thinking back now, the Western-style songs he used to do, and the lyrics that could rival any singer-songwriter...

That must’ve been the first glimpse of his talent as a producer, huh?

With something as a born talent and personality, plus a heapin’ dose of passion and love, ya naturally reel in luck and fortune—

As long as ya keep clear o’ scandals after that, boom, you’re a top idol just like that

Back in school, Yoshihide-kun was the popular fella of our year, but now he’s graduated and turned into NiceP

A prodigy who climbed straight up to the top of the idol world in record time, that’s what he was

For Rinne-han to go praisin’ him like that… he really must’ve been somethin’, that NiceP fella

So then. That answer good enough for ya, Madara-han?

I dunno all the details, but… ya kicked up a fuss, so ain’t it only proper to at least offer an apology?

True enough. Seems I went and made things more complicated than they had to be

My bad. From what I’ve heard now, there don’t seem to be many ties between him and Rinne-san. Thanks for answerin’ honestly

That leaves us with nothin’ to go on, huhh?

I figured if I understood what kinda man NiceP was, his intentions’d be easier to see

So, Mike-nekochan, ya think NiceP’s scheming somethin’?

Well, can’t hurt to stay on guard, that’s all

Right now, he’s struttin’ into ES carryin’ the “Thunderbolt” brand name

If he’s as good a man as they say, I got no complaints

But since ES has a history of lettin’ in an underworld figure called Gatekeeper, I can’t just welcome NiceP without caution

Ahh… right, there was that time Anzu-chan got confined. Though from what I heard, it was more like she got treated real well ‘n looked after

I get yer worries, Mike-nekochan, but when it comes to Yoshihide-kun, I don’t think there’s any need

He was a superhuman who shrugged off every scandal, that’s why he held his place as a superstar idol

The funny thing is, there’re a few like that out there, purebred saintly types ya can show the whole world without shame

Been botherin’ me fer a while now, what’s with callin’ him “Mike-nekochan”? He ain’t near as cute as one o’ them critters

The lack of cuteness is somethin’ y’all share, Kohaku-san, meow?

Don’t talk nonsense. And quit tackin’ on them fool tails to yer words

Nahaha, you two’re in perfect sync~ ♪ Like a couple o’ cats play-fightin

Hah? Who ya callin’ a cat?

Nahaha… j-just kiddin’, just kiddin’!

Still though, didn’t know you and NiceP had that kinda history, Rinne-kun~?

Could it be that the reason you’re all jaded now’s ‘cause of NiceP?

Back then you were way more pure, right? Having an idol like him so close by, must’ve stirred somethin’ in ya, huh?

Hmmm? So Rinne-han had a time like that, did he?

Back then I was just a dumb kid who didn’t know nothin’

I thought being a proper, orthodox idol was “normal”… I didn’t know any better, so I just did it without question

Didn’t matter whether Yoshihide-kun was there or not

I just hit a wall and started lookin’ at myself. Thanks to me, AkanP had to quit the industry, and by the time I looked back, it was already too late

That’s it! That’s all I got to say!

Pizza’s gettin’ cold, so why don’t ya head on home already?

HiMERU agrees

No point in pressing Amagi further, nothing else’ll come out. Shall we look for someone else who knows NiceP’s past?

HGood idea. Let’s check in with some folks from back then

Me, I actually find folks who believe themselves pure and righteous without doubt the scariest of all

Yer one twisted fella, Madara-han

Gyahaha♪ I get whatcha mean, Mike-nekochan♪

If I didn’t know Yoshihide-kun myself, I’d be suspicious on NiceP as well

So I got a lil’ proposal

Hm?

Instead of beating around the bush, why not just ask NiceP directly?

If it’s out in the open, he can’t just pull somethin’ shady even if he was a bad guy. Won’t turn out too bad that way

Hmmm… since you’re an old acquaintance, Rinne-san, it wouldn’t be strange for you to reach out

Alright then, let’s have you make the excuse to slip into NiceP’s good graces

…Hold up. Looks like that ain’t necessary

Just now, while we were talkin’, a message came in from NiceP

I got contacted at the exact same time

What about the rest of ya? Get any messages?

Nope, not me

HiMERU didn’t get one either

Them too, huh. …So that means NiceP only reached out to Rinne-han an’ Madara-han

Now it’s getting real interesting. This godlike timin’ ain’t somethin’ ya see even once in a million

I knew he had miracle-level luck back then, but c’mon, what is he, psychic or somethin’? ♪

“To you who will bear the new era of idols”

“Come to the appointed place at the set time. There’s something important to discuss,” it says…

What do you think, Rinne-san? Shall we take the bait?

Yeah. He went outta his way to call us, saves us the trouble

When the mail says, “To my dear old friend Rinne-kun”… no way I could just ignore it

There’s plenty for me and Yoshihide-kun to catch up on. So how about we treat this like a lil’ class reunion… ☆

Chapter 4

Three days later

Ugh~. I can’t find a single clue…!

I mean, where did NiceP even go? While I was running around searching all over ES, before I knew it, the day of the project announcement had already come!

I wanted to directly negotiate to appear in NiceP’s new project. This is such a waste of time!

If only there was someone who seemed to know about NiceP’s whereabouts. Kunugi-sensei and Sagami-sensei were useless, and Anzu’s nowhere to be found either…

...

Hmm? That’s…

(That’s one of the new faces who appeared in 4piece, right?)

(If I remember right, he was the prodigy boy who joined the Audition after being scouted by NiceP…?)

(I don’t remember his name, but after the Audition he joined the unit Esupuri, and NiceP was producing him too…)

(…This is it! A lead on NiceP!)

(Wow, I’m so smart~! The real genius isn’t this kid, it’s Tori-sama!)

You there! Stop right now!

…(Ignores and keeps walking)

Hey, don’t ignore me!

Hey kid! I’m talking to you, so at least answer me!?

...

Do you need something from me?

Yeah, I was calling you!

You’re that rookie from Esupuri, right? The genius boy!

Yes. I’m Kanna from “Esupuri.” I just recently joined NewDi as a rookie

Kanna, huh… Hmm, I’ll praise you at least for properly introducing yourself

But ignoring your senior’s voice isn’t good, right? There was no one else around, didn’t you think it might be you being called?

No. You seemed like trouble, so I pretended not to hear and was planning to go in my way

~~~~~~!

You did that on purpose!? That makes it even worse, and so annoying~!

...

Sigh…

Whatever it is, just tell me what you need

I’m not free either. This conversation just cost me fifty seconds of my life I’ll never get back

Wh-what is with this guy… he’s such a pain…!

Fine then… I’ll get straight to the point. Do you know where NiceP is?

I’ve been looking for NiceP this whole time. If you have any idea, I want you to tell me

I don’t. (Starts walking toward the exit)

Hey, wait~!? Don’t just leave!

Geez, this is why rookies are hopeless. No manners at all!

In the entertainment world, hierarchy is absolute! Even if people call you a genius boy, if you get cocky you’ll be cast aside in no time, got it?

You have to properly listen to your seniors. Understand?

I’m sorry

I was already told by seniors at the office, “You can just ignore what Tori-kun says”

They said, “He immediately tries to act superior the moment he opens his mouth.” So I was following that advice

That’s Tsukasa’s doing, isn’t it!? What a jerk, spreading bad rumors to juniors beforehand… Who’s the one acting superior first, huh!?

You need to properly figure out which seniors you can actually trust. Tsukasa likes to act all senior-like, but you can’t believe anything he says!

Didn’t you just say, “In the entertainment world, hierarchy is absolute”?

You’ve always got a comeback, huh~! How annoying can you get!?

Anyway! You must not believe anything Tsukasa says!

If you’re going to treat anyone as a senior, it should be me! Me, Himemiya Tori, the student council president of Yumenosaki Academy!

I see. Understood.

In that case, I’ll also forget the prior information that said, “Himemiya-san is the tyrannical and cruel king who rules over Yumenosaki Academy”

That’s a lie too! Seriously, what is Tsukasa filling your head with!?

…Wait, this isn’t the time for that. I need to find NiceP

You really don’t know where NiceP is? He’s producing you, right?

No. I also haven’t been in contact with Nice-san for several days

He seemed busy with the newly announced project the other day. We’ve been doing lessons as a unit for a while

I see~ So that means there’s no lead after all

I thought that since he directly produces Esupuri, you’d know more about the new project. Guess I was wrong

…Right. Ignoring-Glasses

Do you still need something?

Use that brain of yours and try to guess where NiceP is! Since they call you a genius, you should be good at this, right?

...

What’s with that pause…? Your attitude makes you seem annoyed

Yes. That’s exactly right

It’s troublesome, but it can’t be helped. I was just taught to “obey what seniors say,” so I’ll share only minor clues

Nice-san has hidden hints in Esupuri’s work documents before

He’s a born entertainer, so he might do that naturally

So, it’s safe to assume that hints were also hidden in the video the other day

His suggestive behavior and the deliberate choice to announce it three days later were part of encouraging that too

Huh. So that’s NiceP’s personality? Now that I hear it, he reminds me a bit of Hibiki-senpai

So… what exactly is that hint?

That’s enough. Figure it out yourself

You’re leaving after saying that!?

Come on! You’ve told me this much already. Don’t tease me, just tell me!

…Please let me go already

You’ll understand if you watch the video―

Nice-san’s footage was shot from above

From above…? You mean… up in the sky…?

Chapter 5

At the same time

Was it really okay to ignore an email from someone like that Nice fellow?

I thought you might share some common ground with his lofty ideals

Hmph. So the moment I show myself, this is what happens? Was this “Nice Produce” production really that impressive?

You’re completely mistaken if you thought I’d be persuaded, Wataru

Did you really think I would cooperate with NiceP’s new project?

Non. If you thought so, that’s extremely naive!

I take pride in creating art that is truly one-of-a-kind. I went to Paris alone and grew up as an artist

But you know I’m not the type to watch a patron’s mood, don’t you?

What I dislike most is being made to create something according to someone else’s wishes

Even knowing that, I can’t understand why you recommended me. There must be plenty of suitable candidates elsewhere

Exactly, because you’re my closest friend♪

What is this… using “closest friend” at a time like this… are you plotting something?

Not quite. I mean it sincerely

You are one of the few friends I can truly connect with

That Nice fellow chose me as the top successful candidate in “4piece”. That’s why I wanted to recommend you and Rei for the next project

There are idols in ES even more talented than me. They’re the kind of people who make the idol industry interesting… so to speak♪

Hmph. Don’t drag other people into this on your own

There must be plenty of idols who want to work with NiceP, right? If you invite them, they’ll probably accept it with a smile

I have a personal and noble mission to fulfill my own art

Using NiceP myself is one thing, but I have no intention of being used

Hehe. You’re the same as always, Shu

I just wanted to see you working on something together with Rei

Well, forcing it would just be a tragedy for both of us anyway

The other candidates are also talented enough. Let’s have them do their best on your behalf, Shu

Others? Are you gathering people besides Rei as well?

Yes. Including Rei and you, I’ve reached out to four skilled individuals

It seems that Nice fellow wants them to call themselves the “Four Kings of the Sky”…

How materialistic… Ignoring it was definitely the right choice

Grouping skilled individuals together and making them take a name… it seems like a revival of the “Five Eccentrics”

Being turned into a single collective called the Five Eccentrics made us lose our strength

Each of our individual merits was tarnished, our respect and consideration taken away, and we were elevated as villains to be defeated

Where is the guarantee that NiceP, like Tenshouin, won’t trample over us ES idols?

That… hehe. There isn’t any guarantee at all!

But there’s no guarantee that people won’t change. Shu, you know that much yourself

Wataru, you’re as you always are. You keep dancing along, performing according to someone else’s script to meet their expectations

I don’t mean to deny you, but as a long-time friend, I’ll say this

I don’t know what kind of person NiceP is, but choose carefully the friends you associate with

Just like Tenshouin, NiceP might also be expecting “that” from you

I see… Thank you for your advice

But Eichi and I aren’t exactly “best friends,” you know

Ever since being chosen for one of the “Nice Dream Units” people keep saying, “Is NiceP’s production really that good?”

It’s like a clumsy little comedy, really

Hmph. Is this supposed to be a lovers’ quarrel? I have no interest in listening to such nonsense

That’s enough. I’m busy with my creative work

Oh, my apologies. Seems like that wasn’t to your liking?

Then, I’ll decline on your behalf to that Nice fellow

Let’s meet again, my friend… ♪

Ah. We just worked together as the “Five Eccentrics” before, and it’s still too early for a reunion

…Hm? That’s noisy. Seems like your smartphone is ringing

Oh? A call from Princess? That’s unusual…

“Hello? Hibiki-senpai?”

“Hibiki-senpai, you know a lot about the sky, right? You ride hot air balloons and stuff?”

…Uh? Not that much, but is something the matter?

“Actually, I’m looking for NiceP right now!”

“NiceP said there would be an announcement for the new project, right?”

“I’ll rush to the site and negotiate directly with NiceP! I’ll tell him, “Include me in the new project!”

…

“Ah, don’t tell Eichi-sama yet, okay? He doesn’t seem to like NiceP that much, so I’ll just observe for now!”

I see, so that’s the situation

In that case, why don’t you try going to the airport?

The airport?

“Yes. Nice fellow isn’t going to stay up in the sky for three full days, right?”

“Actually, I’ve been helping with the new project consultations. It seems he often comes and goes through airports near ES”

Eh? You know about NiceP?

“Yes. Though I don’t know the full details of the project”

“He seems to be looking for the “Four Kings of the Sky”, four idols. Right now, there might just be a slot open”

“This time, I recommended skilled individuals who didn’t participate in 4piece”

Wait a minute! Then why didn’t you recommend me?

I’m part of fine too, you know? Speaking of fine, it’s one of the strongest units, part of the Big Three!

Fufu. I thought you, Princess, wouldn’t do anything to upset Eichi yourself

“However, you, Princess, are steadily distancing yourself from Eichi, ignoring my concerns. I misjudged your growth♪”

“You now may be the idol fit for this new era”

“…There’s no time to be chatting like this, though”

“It’s almost the time that that Nice fellow has designated. If you head to the airport now, you should make it in time”

Thank you, Hibiki-senpai! I’ll head to the nearby airport and try to find NiceP!

What was that call just now? It sounded pretty chaotic—

Hehe. It seems they’ve been found. The new “Four Kings of the Sky”

Giving them the answer might be “too much,” perhaps. But this is also my way of thanking them for letting me participate in the fun event called 4piece

I wish you luck, Princess

You yourself are worthy of being a pioneer of this new era…♪

Translation Notes

  1. ↑ During Tempest, fine members are working a lot and don’t have time to spend together, specially Eichi. So, as a solution, they create something called “Eichi Day”, a day off they would pass together.
  2. ↑ Here, madara says "ナイス・アルネブ・サンダー氏" (Nice Arneb Thunder-shi), in this case "氏" (shi) is rendered as “Mr.”, because it is not considered an honorific in Japanese. Unlike titles such as "さん" (san) or "様"(sama), which directly express respect or familiarity, "氏" functions as a neutral, formal marker used mainly in writing to identify a person by surname.
  3. ↑ Hana Ichimonme (花いちもんめ) is a traditional Japanese children’s game where two teams face each other and kinda “claim” members from the opposite side, usually while singing a playful song
  4. ↑ During Ephemeral Festival, it is said that HiMERU and Kohaku, who have come to be known as the PBB (Pastel Bee Brothers), are getting a lot of attention and working as a duo a lot.

entry.title: Metamorphose - Epilogue
entry.content:
This story is fully voiced in-game.
It's recommended to listen to the story in-game while reading!
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Season: Summer
Location: Metamorphose Stage

"Kukuku… With this power I got a step ahead, shall I go wild to my heart's content?"

"Lowly idols! Kneel before me and tremble in fear…!"

"♪~♪~♪"

"Hahaha! Rei, you're really owning that role, huh"

"You suit the villainous side even better♪"

"Oh? I didn't mean to be a villain…"

"But know this, I have always been a formidable opponent standing in your way"

"You too should hurry up and come here. An idol's struggle for dominance, by idols, that is the wish of the "Four Kings of the Sky""

…So he says. Are you listening, idols on the other side of the screen?"

"We, the "Four Kings of the Sky," have acquired new power"

"A massive "Transformation" that will shake the very foundations of the idol world"

"Any idol brave enough to challenge us should come to Mega Sphere!"

"Here, new developments, new battles, and a new future await!"

"You're not just going to sit idly by, licking your fingers, are you?"

"Hah… Sakuma-senpai's such a cheat character. Even though he said he's not good with new tech, he adapted right away"

"But a little chaos isn't so bad. I'll join in too"

"Even if kind Yoshihide-kun planned all this, the "Big Flow" is crueler, more merciless, like a natural disaster"

"There will inevitably be people who can't keep up with it"

"I learned that painfully during ES. When something changes, it drags countless innocent people along, without caring about personal circumstances"

"That's why next time, I'll put myself at the center of that flow"

"I don't think anyone can stop this flow, but with me at the center, countless people will be saved, right?

"Even delinquent idols can get their fair amount of the spotlight. Those considered "wrong" by society will still get a chance to shine!"

"A world like that isn't so bad…☆"

"Don't forget that either, Mike-nekochan"

"Excessive goodwill can hurt people. Keep that in mind, self-proclaimed "Mama""

"Fufu. Mama can be a little meddlesome sometimes, you know? She just can't help overhearing things"

"Rinne-san, I apologize for suddenly interrogating you like that"

"At the same time, understand that my suspicion toward NiceP wasn't unfounded"

"Though our positions differ, we are now bound as the same Four Kings of the Sky. Ride the "Big Flow" with me, and we may glimpse a new world ahead♪"

"♪~♪~♪"

"♪~♪~♪"

Seeing them up close, their skill is incredible. They really have the aura to live up to the name "the Four Kings of the Sky"… You can actually feel it

They're all laid-back and anxious in their own ways, but I'm excited to be around such new people and a new environment

I've always been the cute little chick of the group until now

Eichi-sama looked out for me and entrusted me with responsibilities

But I'm not strong enough yet to support Eichi-sama. I have to seize the chance myself…!

Hibiki-senpai, I'll break through my own limits too

With NiceP's production and the power of "Transformation," surely—

"Now, it's finally my turn!"

"The other three are all strong in their own ways, but I'm still the best♪"

"The "Transformed" me will make all previous idols a thing of the past!"

"This is the new era of idols! I'll make this a live show no one will ever forget, so watch till the very end!"

And from now on, I'll be the one shaping this era

As the world's strongest, "Transforming" idol!

"♪~♪~♪"

entry.title: Metamorphose - Prologue
entry.content:
This story is fully voiced in-game.
It's recommended to listen to the story in-game while reading!
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements Staff
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Season: Summer
In a certain town, on a river island, stands the sacred home of idols, Ensemble Square. Known to all as “ES”
One July day, in the second year since the establishment

Hah, hah…!

What’s that!? I don’t get it!

But it’s makin’ my heart race☆

Location: ES Sky Garden

Hokke~, Ukki~, Sari~! You guys came too?

Yeah. You saw that thing too and rushed over here, right~?

I dunno how to say it… but it’s even more shocking than the first time I saw ES. Seriously, what is that?

If something like that showed up outside your window, of course you’d go out to look. Even people from ES are coming over… see? Looks like it’s already trending on Social Media too

It’s like I’m dreaming. A massive hulk of iron, beyond everything we know, coming toward us…

What’s about to begin…?

Ahaha! So you guys feel the same! When you see somethin’ that sparkly, there’s no way you can just sit still☆

It’s sooo pretty. What could it be?

“This “transformation” marks the dawn of a new idol era”

“You too, burn this miraculous program into your memory!”

“The moment these idols step into a new phase, shining with more than just song and dance!”

“From here, we’ll broadcast their charm, too big for any set frame, to the whole world!”

“For your sake, we’ll fill this world with all things wonderful, things truly Nice”

“Look forward to this ultimate new program: Mega Stream!”

entry.title: Metamorphose
entry.content:
• English
  • PT-BR
Metamorphose
メタモルフォーゼ
Start Reading
4piece has ended and the idols’ lives have returned to normalcy, when one day, the mysterious blimp Mega Sphere suddenly flies into the sky above ES. With Tori, Rei, Rinne, and Madara calling themselves the "Four Kings of the Sky,” a never before seen live is about to begin…!

Summer
Chapters
13
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Characters

Metamorfose
メタモルフォーゼ
Comece a Ler
A 4piece acabou e a vida dos idols voltou a normalidade, quando um dia, o misterioso dirigível Mega Sphere subitamente voa sobre o céu acima do ES. Com Tori, Rei, Rinne e Madara se autoproclamando os "Quatro Reis do Céu," uma live nunca vista antes esta prestes a começar…!

entry.title: Metamorphose - Chitose Tsuzura, Bystander in an Ambiguous World
entry.content:
• English
  • PT-BR
This story is fully voiced in-game.
It's recommended to listen to the story in-game while reading!
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
The translation notes (references) for multilingual stories are currently experiencing issues. For now, please rely on the in-text references rather than the footnotes at the bottom of the page.
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Season: Summer
July, ES' second year of establishment. The Producer Room of a certain facility

Wow. So this is the "Producer Room"

They even set up such a big room for this… this facility really is amazing in every way—

Fufu. Looks like you, and Anzu-chan as well, can't hide your surprise

This room is a new base of the Mega Sphere, equipped with the finest facilities for producers

Here in "Mega Sphere," apart from private areas like living quarters, every action is recorded without omission

Not only that, but thanks to cooperation with SNS companies1, we can also reveal the reactions to videos and shows that idols post

In other words, it's what you'd call big data analysis

Of course, the most trusted thing is still the producer's own eye. But this system supports that vision to the utmost

And naturally, the device I gave you—the "Mega Phone", provides part of these functions, so you don't need to stay in this room all the time

You can watch idols' lessons, analyze them, check reactions on SNS, use it all to aid in your producing

Any tool depends on how you use it. Feel free to use it however you like

Of course, unless you dislike using it together with me♪

Hm? More than that, are you wondering who the person next to me is?

My apologies for the late introduction. This is Chitose Tsuzura, a new employee dispatched here from "Thunderbolt" as me

He just joined Thunderbolt. His title is "Assistant Director"

With live-streaming shaking up the entertainment industry, Thunderbolt decided to directly hire him as their first video staffer to ride that wave

Come now, Chitose. Don't stay silent, introduce yourself

When you think of the role entrusted to you, you can't afford to be passive, can you?

Ah, sorry, Nice-san. You're right, that really wouldn't be good, huh?

I mess up no matter what I do. Even though they finally made me a new hire, I tripped right from the start—

Please, just don't fire me…!

Calm down, Tsuzura-kun. I don't believe I've ever once declared you fired, have I?

Come now—deep breaths, deep breaths…♪

Sighh—

Puuuuuuufff—

Hhk—cough cough!

Sorry, Anzu-san. I'm just… bad at living, I guess. I'm always like this

Umm, I'll explain properly—

I'm Chitose Tsuzura. I'm a new employee at Thunderbolt and I was assigned as an Assistant Director—

It seems my first mission is to record what happens in this new facility, Mega Sphere

In other words, to film a sort of documentary video…?

Ah—ah, sorry. I should sound more confident, right…?

It's fine. I'm just not confident but I think that's correct, probably—

I'm good at simple tasks, so running the camera should suit me, though…

Since it's a documentary, maybe I should be asking you more questions too, Anzu-san…?

You're finding me hard to hear and want me to speak clearer? Ah, n-no, that's not what I meant…!

I'm just bad at "proper" things like work and daily life in general, and kind of panicking about it…

I only even became an employee at "Thunderbolt" because Nice-san was there, really…

I was drifting from part-time job to part-time job and Nice-san found me and took me in. Said I worked earnestly, or something like that

Even though I'm called a new employee, it's still a probation period, so I don't know when I might get fired, though…?

Ah, by the way, the badge on my name tag is like my "remaining lives"

Each time I make a mistake, a heart gets deducted, and when it reaches "0" the contract ends in the middle of the probation period, something like that—

By the way, it started at "10."

Before I knew it, it had dropped to "3," and I can't help but worry about Tsuzura-kun's future initiative

Is it really okay like this…?

I don't know… But I'll do my very best, so I'd be happy if you'd cheer me on too, Anzu-san

Ahaha. I'm not confident, but if even someone like me can live, then the filming will probably work out somehow too…

Huh? Bed hair, you say…?

Ah, sorry, this is just natural hair, or like, I've always had wavy hair…!

S-sorry. I'm plain and no good, and sometimes people say I "stand out" so maybe I should just shave my head bald…?

Being twenty-four and still needing younger kids to worry about me is bad, right. Yeah, it's showing me just how unreliable I am

Well, he's a newcomer whose one flaw is being too humble

But I value his talent

Apart from being weak under pressure and lacking confidence, he does very good work. Especially, he's the type who devotes himself thoroughly to any job he's given

I've watched his earnest attitude with my own eyes since before he joined "Thunderbolt." That's exactly why I recommended him to them

It's embarrassing to say so myself, but it was the eyes of a world-class producer that judged so. On that point, you can rest assured.

…Isn't that right, Tsuzura-kun?

U-uhh, that's—

I wonder… I don't know—

But I'll work hard so I can live up to Nice-san's expectations too

I might cause trouble for you too, Anzu-san, though

I'll work as hard as I can, so please just don't fire me…?

Translation Notes

Chitose Tsuzura, Espectador em um Mundo Ambíguo

Essa história é totalmente dublada dentro do jogo.
É recomendado ouvir a história enquanto lê a tradução!
Essa história não passou por uma revisão de tradução.
Veja os Termos de Serviço para história não revisadas.
Eu adoraria ter essa história revisada algum dia, se você tem interesse, entre em contanto no meu Twitter/X!
As notas de tradução (referências) para histórias com mais de uma lingua, estão passando por problemas no momento. Por agora, se concentre nas notas dentro do texto da história em vez das que se encontram no fim da página.
Personagens
Escritor
Happy Elements K.K
Tradutores
lukas
Revisão de Tradução
Não revisado
Estação: Verão
Julho, o segundo ano desde a fundação do ES. A Sala de Produtores de uma certa instalação

Uau. Então essa é a “Sala de Produtores.”

Eles até arranjaram uma sala grande pra isso… Essa instalação é incrível de todos os jeitos—

Fufu. Parece que você e a Anzu-chan, não conseguem esconder a surpresa.

Essa sala é a uma nova base da Mega Sphere, equipada com as melhores instalações pra produtores.

Aqui na “Mega Sphere”, sem contar áreas privada como quartos, todas as suas ações são gravadas sem omissão.

Não só isso, mas graças a cooperação com as redes sociais, nós também podemos mostrar as reações a vídeos e programas que os idols postam.

Em outras palavras, isso é o que você chama de grande “Data Analysis.”

Claro, a coisa mais confiável é o julgamento do produtor. Mas esse sistema deixa o julgamento afiado.

E naturalmente, o dispositivo que eu dei pra você—o “Mega Phone,” providência parte dessas funções, então você não precisa ficar nessa sala o tempo todo.

Você pode assistir aos treinos dos idols, analisá-los, ver as reações nas redes sociais, use isso ao seu favor na produção.

Qualquer ferramenta depende de como você usa. Sinta-se livre pra usar do jeito que você quiser.

Claro, a menos que você não gostem de usar junto comigo♪

Hm? Além disso, você está se perguntando quem essa pessoa perto de mim é?

Minhas desculpas pela introdução tardia. Esse é Chitose Tsuzura, um novo funcionário posto aqui pela Thunderbolt como eu.

Ele acabou de se juntar a Thunderbolt. O cargo dele é “Assistente Diretor”

Com stremar chegando forte na indústria do entretenimento, a Thunderbolt decidiu contratá-lo diretamente como gerente de vídeo pra seguir essa onda.

Venha, Chitose. Não fique em silêncio, se introduza.

Quando você pensa no cargo que foi dado a você, você não pode ser passivo, né?

Ah, foi mal, Nice-san. Você tá completamente certo, isso não seria bom, né?

Eu estrago tudo independente do que eu faça. Mesmo que eu finalmente fui empregado, eu já me ferrei do início—

Por favor, só não me demita…!

Se acalme, Tsuzura-kun. Eu não acho que tenha dito que você estava demitido alguma vez, eu disse?

Vamos lá. Respira fundo, inspira—expira, inspira—expira...♪

Ahh—

Ohhhhhhhhhhhhhhh—

Hhk—cof cof!

Foi mal, Anzu-san… Eu só sou meio… ruim em viver, eu acho. Eu sou sempre assim

Umm, eu vou explicar direito—

Eu sou Chitose Tsuzura. Eu sou um novo empregado na Thunderbolt e eu fui designado como Assistente Diretor—

Parece que minha primeira missão é gravar o que acontece nesta nova instalação, Mega Sphere,

Em outras palavras, como gravar um tipo de documentário…?

Ah—ah, me desculpe. Eu devia ser mais confiante, certo…?

Tá bem. Eu só não sou confiante, mas acho que isso está correto, provavelmente—

Eu sou bom em tarefas simples, então gravar com a câmera até que se encaixa comigo, no entanto…

Como é um documentário, talvez eu devesse estar te perguntando mais perguntas também, Anzu-san…?

Você está me chamando difícil de ouvir e quer que eu fale mais claramente? Ah, não—não, não é o que eu quis dizer…!

Eu só sou ruim em coisas “de verdade” como trabalho e vida diária em geral, e meio que estou surtando sobre isso…

Eu meio que só virei um empregado na Thunderbolt porque o Nice-san tava aqui

Eu tava indo de bico em bico, até que o Nice-san me achou e me trouxe pra cá. Ele disse que eu trabalho valorosamente, ou algo assim.

Mesmo que eu seja chamado de “um novo funcionário,” é um período de experiência, então eu meio que posso ser demitido a qualquer momento…?

Ah, e aliás, os bottons perto do meu nome são tipo minhas “vidas restantes.”

Toda vez que eu cometo um erro, um coração é deduzido, e quando chegar a “0” o contrato acaba no meio do período de experiência, algo assim—

Aliás, começou com 10.

Antes de eu perceber, tinha caído pra 3, e eu acabo me preocupando sobre o futuro do Tsuzura-kun.

Será que tá tudo bem quanto isso…?

Não sei… Mas vou fazer o meu melhor, então eu ficaria feliz se você torcesse por mim também, Anzu-san.

Ahaha. Não tenho um pingo de autoconfiança, mas se alguém como eu consegue viver, então filmar provavelmente vai dar certo de alguma forma também…

Huh? Cabelo bagunçado você diz…?

Aah, desculpe, esse é só meu cabelo natural, ou melhor, eu sempre tive cabelo ondulado…!

F-foi mal. Eu sou simples, e não tenho qualidades, e as vezes as pessoas dizem que eu me “destaco” então talvez eu só devesse “raspar o meu cabelo na 0”...?

Ter 24 anos e ainda ter crianças mais novas que eu se preocupando comigo é bem ruim. É isso só mostra o quão “incerto” eu sou.

Bem, ele é um novato que um defeito é ser muito humilde.

Mas eu dou valor ao seu talento.

Apesar de ser frágil sob pressão e não ter autoestima, ele faz um excelente trabalho. Especialmente, ele é o tipo de pessoa que se dedica completamente a qualquer trabalho que lhe seja atribuído.

Tenho observado sua dedicação com meus próprios olhos desde antes de ele se juntar à Thunderbolt. É exatamente por isso que eu recomendei ele a eles.

É constrangedor admitir, mas foi o olhar de um produtor de renome mundial que chegou a essa conclusão. Nesse ponto, você pode ficar tranquilo.

…Não tá certo, Tsuzura-kun?

U-uhh, isso é—

Eu penso… Não faço ideia—

Mas vou me esforçar bastante pra também corresponder às expectativas do Nice-san.

Pode ser que eu também te cause problemas, Anzu-san.

Vou me esforçar ao máximo, então, por favor, só não me demita...?

  1. ↑ (SNS companies are the operators of social networking services like Twitter (X), Instagram, TikTok, and others. Normally referred as Social Media)
entry.summary: • English

entry.title: Shoe Sores and Aching Muscles - Kohaku Idol Story
entry.content:
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
(My Own Distance) Kohaku Oukawa
Although uncertain, Kohaku searches for the answer to how he wants to express his "current” self. He looks back on the path he has walked as an idol, when…
This story is associated with the song Sakurairo no Claim

Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
JP Name
靴擦れと筋肉痛
Season: Summer

Chapter 1

Location: Mega Sphere Producer Room

Phew, I’m wore out…

Finally made it. Sorry fer makin’ ya wait, Anzu-han, hope ya can forgive me?

I set out with plenty o’ time, but dang if I didn’t go an’ lose my way

Ain’t my first time comin’ to the Producer Room, yet it’s a funny thing. Guess I just assumed I’d get here no problem, an’ wound up headin’ clean the wrong way

When I realized it, I was standin’ smack dab in the opposite direction. Let out a weird yelp without meanin’ to

I figured, I managed fine in the city, I’ll be just fine here too… turns out that baseless confidence was just plain ol’ arrogance

…Come to think of it, when we first met, Anzu-han, it was kinda the same

I was lost at the station an’ you came up talkin’ to me. Ya remember?

I remember it clear. Back then I didn’t have the faintest clue where ES was, just stood there frozen

When it showed up after just walkin’ a bit, I was real shocked. Couldn’t believe I missed a buildin’ that huge. Felt pitiful

But well, it ain’t a bad memory. Since we was headin’ the same way, ya walked with me, even patched up my blisters

The city’s all glittery but cold somehow. Still, there’s good folks ‘round, that made me happy

…Even today, if I’d called ya, ya would’ve come pick me up? Anzu-han, you really are kind

But I ain’t no kid no more, ya know. Compared to back then, I can get anywhere on my own feet

I’m used to my shoes now, no more sore feet from walkin’ ‘round. Bein’ clueless ‘bout left or right, that’s all in the past

…Well, gettin’ lost in the first place still ain’t exactly cool

At least ya didn’t see me openin’ the map app and wanderin’ in circles

Anyhow, just makin’ it here on my own feels good. Ain’t much, but there’s a sense of achievement

And if next time I come without messin’ up, then this weren’t a failure. It’s experience

This time I can brush it off as a “personal errand”, but if it was work, I couldn’t be so easygoin’

I’ll make today’s wrong turn count next time. Don’t worry ‘bout me

So then, let’s get to the point, what’s this errand ‘bout?

…Hmm, hmm. Heard rumors ‘bout that. Somethin’ that just started, right?

As part of Mega Stream, idols doin’ solo live streams…

Oh, makin’ a costume just for that stream, huh

So that means it’s a pretty serious project. Well, if all idols are included, I s’pose it’s natural

So? What ya want bringin’ that up with me?

…Ya wanna hear my opinion? Someone new like me don’t know half as much as you, Anzu-han. Ain’t even worth askin’, is it?

Ehh… next is my turn…?

Whe-what’s that ‘bout! This ain’t no “personal errand,” it’s proper work!

I thought it’d be more like small talk, at most just casual chat, so I came here relaxed…

True enough, like ya said, reckon a solo job could count as a “personal errand”...

Nah nah, normally it doesn't! But knowin’ you, Anzu-han, ya just said that so I wouldn’t get all tense

I get it now. Ya wanna put my tastes and image into the costume, heh

“The me I wanna show right now,”. Hmm…

…Nothin’ comes to mind right off

If it’s clothes I wanna wear… I could pick casual wear easy enough

But it ain’t like I feel strongly, “I wanna wear this,” I just grab whatever on a whim

And idol costumes are another thingy. Somethin’ that important, I get nervous thinkin’ if it’s really okay for me to decide

I do kinda think it’d be good if it’s a costume fans love, one they’ll remember forever

But what you’re wantin’, Anzu-han, ain’t that sorta “right answer,” it’s my own feelings, ain’t it?

If ya ask how I wanna show myself now, honestly I got no idea

But still… since ya called me out like this, feels wasteful to say nothin’

Like ya said, I could leave it up to ya, Anzu-han, but if I do nothin’, it’s the same as back then

Same as that time I was just standin’ there, surrounded by huge buildings

…I been lost plenty since becomin’ an idol, but I still remember every path I walked on my own feet

That’s why this time too… even if I wander ‘round, I’ll find the answer myself

Mega Sphere’s so wide it still feels like I done come to some foreign country

Might sound dramatic talkin’ ‘bout how I’ll live here

But maybe it’ll be a good chance to think on how I’ll spend my days in this new place

Chapter 2

Location: A hallway within the Mega Sphere Tower

(What kinda of self I wanna show, huh... bein’ asked with no clue like this, it’s not somethin’ you can answer easily)

(Good thing I got some time to think. I gotta thank Anzu-han)

(Hmm… For now, I’ll take another look at the outfits I’ve worn so far. Might give me some clues)

(This one’s from when I did Crazy:B, and this one’s from Double Face…)

(I hadn’t really noticed before, ‘cause I was always focused on the work at hand, but the vibe really changes with each unit)

(But… what is it…? I’ve got good feelings for both, but maybe it’s better not to use the unit outfits as reference)

(This time I’m standin’ not as a unit, but as Kohaku Oukawa himself)

(…I think I understand that logic, at least in my own way)

(Tryin’ not to think about the unit’s image is tough. That means my choices get a lot narrower)

(Speakin’ of solo, I remember wearin’ my exclusive outfit that had a cherry blossom on the back)

(It was beautiful, and I think it suited me pretty well too)

(I’ve always been familiar with traditional clothes, but it doesn’t feel like what I want to show now)

(Not just an extension of the past. What can I show as Kohaku Oukawa in this very moment? It’s tough…)

(…Hm? Someone’s here)

(Mutterin’ to myself here, but what are them doin’? Don’t look like them are lost though…)

Found it! I’ve discovered the hidden exit leadin’ to a brand-new world☆

After a hundred years of hardship! A huge adventure full of ups and downs has paid off! Congrats to me!

With this, I’ve gotten one step closer to the “Million Secrets” slumberin’ in Mega Sphere—where findin’ them all grants your wish!

Advancin’ straight toward uncoverin’ the truth! The adventurer Esu’s journey ain’t over yet…☆

Now, what awaits ahead, I wonder~

—That ain’t an exit, it’s a vent, y’know?

Ah! Hello, Kohaku-senpai. Thanks for your hard work

Thanks for bein’ polite. You’re Esu-han, right?

What’ve ya been doin’ all this time? And what’s this “Million Secrets” thing anyway?

Good question! My unit mates don’t really go along with it~

”Million Secrets” is just somethin’ I made up. Mega Sphere’s huge, so it ain’t strange if there’s that many secrets, right?

But still, a million… realistically, ain’t a hundred enough?

No no. It’s “Mega”, so a million’s gotta be about right

Geez. I just don’t get what kids do

How old are ya, anyway?

Me? I’m sixteen

No way, really?

It’s true. Look, my ID~

…It really is. Same age as me, huh

Eh!???? Seriously??????

I always thought you were older! Crazy:B is a unit with a grown-up vibe, isn’t it!

Kohaku-senpai’s calm and presence… it’s totally that of a veteran

But if we’re the same age, callin’ ya senpai’s weird. Uh… Kohaku-kun?

Whoa, feels kinda off…!

Kohkohkoh♪ I actually prefer it that way. Rarely anyone calls me senpai anyway

When it comes to same age, only Rabu-han comes to mind, and I’m the youngest in the unit. Feels kinda close, y’know?

I get that! The moment I realized we’re the same age, all the walls came down☆

I’d be glad if we can get along from here! Pleased to meet yaaaaaa!

…You’re mighty energetic. How do you have that much voice?

Thankss! Energy’s my only sellin’ point!

That’s respectable in its own way though…

(I wonder… Esu-han feels so dazzling. Hard to believe we’re the same age)

(…Even Rabu-han’s kinda cheerful. Esu-han feels more age-appropriate, I guess)

(If I’d grown up somewhere else, livin’ a different life… would I have been more lively too…?)

Hm? Something wrong?

Ah, nuthin’

It’s just… lookin’ at you makes me feel like I’ve aged a bit

Feels like I’ve been left behind a little

Left behind, huh… are we talkin’ about speed?

Speed?

Yeah. Like how you go through life, growin’… that kinda stuff!

But it’s all good! There ain’t no early or late for startin’ an adventure!

Strike while the iron’s hot! Let’s go together!

Go out? That’s a vent, ya know

Open sesameeeeeeee! Come on, let’s go to a brand new world☆

Hey, don’t pull my sleeve…!

Oi! Listen to what I’m sayin’!?

Location: Mega Sphere Proucer Room
Time: The next day

Anzu-han, thanks for makin’ the time. About the outfit we talked ‘bout yesterday…

Eh? You mean my movements are stiff?

You really noticed that? Is it that obvious?

Don’t worry, it’s just muscle soreness

Yesterday, we… walked all over Mega Sphere, me and Esu-han

In Esu-han’s words, that was an “adventure”

We didn’t go into vents, thankfully. But we walked forever up emergency stairs, back alleys, weird spots

Places no one normally pays attention to

My legs are screamin’. I rarely ever get muscle pain though

…Used muscles I normally don’t? Hm, makes sense

If ya think about it, it’s kinda like growth pains. Quietly hurtin’, but… not bad

Esu-han looked like he wanted more, but for me, it was a huge adventure

Just walkin’, but somehow it felt fresh and fun

Probably because what Esu-han saw was totally different from me

Hard to say, but I felt something in Esu-han that I don’t have

…Then it hit me. Maybe my life from now on is an adventure itself

I can’t tell what I’ll be like in the future. Right now, I can’t even imagine

So now, I wanna absorb all sorts of things and grow

So I can move forward on my own two feet. So that when a big goal comes, I can hold my ground

For that reason… I wanna challenge myself with this outfit to show a version of me that could’ve existed

Birth, upbringing, things I like… I’ll set all that aside for a bit

I wanna wrap myself in the atmosphere of kids livin’ in the same era, even a little

…Surely that’s somethin’ only possible “now”

It’s fine to be unsure. Even if it doesn’t suit me, that’s fine too. I wanna go all in, just as I am

Gatherin’ what I lack like that, buildin’ experience little by little…

I feel like that way, I could live more like “Kohaku Oukawa”, holdin’ my chest high…♪

Check Other Idol Stories!

Coffin Dilemma
One Single Person

Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Release
August 9, 2025

Chapter 1

Yume-san, were ya able to rest properly yesterday? If ya couldn't sleep because ya were nervous, ya can always use Mama's lap as a pillow♪

Come on, come hereee! It's okay, I can wake ya up when it's your turn

Uunn, Yume will pass it. Actually, if we weren't in this [Shuffle Unit] together Yume would be calling security like right now.

…Don't worry, Yume is fine. Even so, Yume is not even nervous in the first place.

Hahaha, I guess that was unnecessary meddling on my part. My apologies!

Ugh, could you not talk this loud? You're way too energetic even the live hasn't started yet

But, since [Luv&Peace Densetsu] is a song that makes you feel bright and positive, it kinda suit your vibe perfectly

Chapter 2

Eh, Hibiki-senpai. Do you remember the first time you met with the members of [PM6:∞]

Of course! The thought of what kind of Amazing could be born from six people standing on the same stage… The excitement I felt in myself that day isn't something I could forget so easily…☆

That being said… isn't it a bit too early to be looking back on memories and nostalgia?

Well, even the Live is still ahead of us, I just really wanted to say this…

Fufufu…☆ Am I about to receive a love confession here!?

N-no, that's not it~! I just wanted to say thanks for supporting my idea of making the choreography something the fans could enjoy together with us…!

Fufu, I was only joking with you. I'm also one of the members of [PM6:∞], so there's no need to thank me♪

Chapter 3

This heart-flying effect is just sooo lovelyy, no matter how many times I come to see it. It suits Yume perfectly…♪

Ya look pretty happy, hee~

Oh yeah, when we first talked about how the stage would be like, you were the first one to bring it up, right? Like, saying the hearts just had to be in there

Yeahhh, Even when we were talking about what accessories to put on the costumes, you were tossing out ideas like crazy

Well, to make a good stage, that kind of attention to every detail really matters. Having you throw out ideas really helped us out too

Heeh~ we're not really here just to chat. Being cute is totally [Ra*bits] thing, and we gotta make sure all the fans get to see it too♪

Chapter 4

Shiina-senpai, did you know? Choreography that uses the hands and fingers, kinda like finger dances, is actually pretty popular with the fans♪

Heeh, is that soo~?

Yeah. Seems like it's partly because the moves look cute, too

And since it's just hands and fingers, they don't have to worry about the person sitting next to them, you know? They can copy us and have fun together

Guess there really are lots of ways for everyone to have fuun~. I learned somethin' new!

Fufu. Well then, shall we practice the choreography together?

Chapter 5

That moment of the lyrics, [In a snap of the moment]… The choreography turned out pretty unique compared to how it was at first, didn' it?

Yume-san and I make a frame with our hands, and Wataru-san becomes the subject. It really shows off the [unit's] charm, I like it a lott, ya know♪

Fufufu. That choreography was thought up by Little Rabbit-san, wasn't it~♪

Ah. Since I saw Hajime-chin and Yume-chin taking photos, I thought it might be a good idea to incorporate that into the choreography

You could say this idea was born precisely because Nazuna-san cared about the juniors so much!

Ahaha, hearing you say that makes me kinda shy, but I'd be happy if it turns out well♪

Chapter 6

The fans were copying Yume and making hears with their hands…♪

Just like the theme of this song, "Bakuage", it was an amazing stage!1

By the way, I've been wondering, what does the "Age" in the lyrics mean again? There were a lottt of words in these lyrics that I had never heard before

Oh, it means something like "the best" or "getting hyped up"… I guess this might be a generation gap thing

Yeaahh, I'm sure that's it. But somehow, singing it just makes me feel really happy! Like, it gives me energy, you know…

Fufufu, that's exactly what it means to Agaru! Amazing…✩2

Translation Notes

  1. ↑ Bakuage (爆アゲ) is a Japanese slang term meaning "super hype" or "totally pumped up," often used to describe something exciting or energetic.
  2. ↑ Agaru it's the infinitive form of Age (アゲ), as stated before, it's translated as something like "to get hyped".

entry.title: Shu Management Story 4 - with Tsumugi
entry.content:
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Asia Blossoms
Location: At Yumenosaki's Library

...

Ah, Shu-kun! You came to hang out at the library~. What kind of book are you looking for? I can recommend what I think you'd enjoy♪

Aoba.. How dare a bastard like you speak to me…

Ehh? Since you came to the library as a guest, Shu-kun, I don't think it's strange to talk to you as a library committee member, right?

Anyway, back to the topic at hand, what kind of book are you looking for? I know most of the books here, so if you tell me the title, I can find it for you right away

Even if you don't know the name, just tell me the book genre and I can find something from there~♪

Hmph, I'd rather look for it myself than having to rely on you

I already know which shelf it's on, so I don't need your help anyway

Ahaha, I guess I was just meddling. But I still want to get along with you like we did before, Shu-kun. Though, I know that's just my selfish wish

...

W-wait, don't just put the book down silently! Eh… you're borrowing this book, right?

Fufu, borrowing a crafting book is so like you, Shu-kun~. I actually borrowed and read it myself the other day. It's quite an interesting—

Aoba

Yes? What do you need?

Unlike you, I'm busy. If you've finished the checking it out, hand me the book at once.

Ah, that's right. The return deadline is the week after next, so please make sure to bring it back by then

Hmph, there's no way I'd ever forget. When the time comes, you'll have to come pick it up at the Handicraft Club yourself.

I'm not going to welcome you, but as a member of the Handicraft Club, I'll let you enter

entry.title: One Single Person - Madara Mikejima Idol Story
entry.content:
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
(Sole Room Occupant) Madara Mikejima
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not proofread.
JP Name
一人、ひとつ
Season: Summer
Location: MaM's Unit Dorm

Hmm, that took more time than I thought. I only meant to take a quick look, but I ended up stayin’ longer than expected

Even so… The convenience store here in Mega Sphere may look ordinary, but it’s actually pretty impressive

In contrast to the unique passage area, at first glance it looks no different from a regular chain store on the surface…

But the selection is hugee, and they even have foreign snacks I’ve never seen before. Thanks to that, it was a nice little change of pace

I’m hoomeee☆

…Oops, I went and said it out loud even though nobody’s here. Guess that’s a leftover habit from living in the dorms

Hmm? That’s strange, I feel like there’s someone here…

…Ohh?

Zzz… Zzz…

Why is Mika-san here? Did he mistake this for his room?

…Nope. With all my stuff lying around, it must be Mika-san who got the wrong room

Mmm, he’s fast asleep. I hate to have to wake up him, but I can’t just leave him like this either

Alright then, Mama will wake him gently♪

Mika-san, wake uppp☆

…Nnh, nn…?

Oshi-san, don’t wake me up yet…

Oops, he’s half-asleep. Fufu, like a baby, it’s so cutee

But I’m not your Oshi-san, I’m your mamaaa1

Nna…? Mama…?

Fuaaah, uu…… Oh, ’s just Mikejima-senpai

Why’re ya here? Do ya need somethin’ with Valkyrie…?

Hahaha, that’s what I should be saying, isn’ it? This is my room, after all

Ehh……?

...Nn—ahhh!? I-I’m soooo sorry! I barged in without permission an’ then fell asleep...!

I really am sorry! I didn’ mean anything bad by it, please forgive me~!

Hahaha. No need to panic so much. I’m not mad or anything, y’know

Real...? Ya’ll forgive me?

Yeahh. I’m also at fault for not locking up, since I was just goin’ out for a bit

But why’d ya come to my room? Wouldn’t it be better for you to sleep in Valkyrie’s room?

That’s... ’m not too sure myself.

If I had to say, maybe ’s ‘cause the rooms are built the same?

If I’d looked properly, I’d see the stuff inside was totally different, an’ realize right away it wasn’t my room…

But the layout’s exactly the same. I must’ve walked in without thinkin’ an’ mistaken it fer mine

I see. Since I’m in a solo unit, they let me use this double room all by myself…

If the setup’s the same as your room, then it’s no wonder you got mixed up

Yeahh… Can’t believe I let my guard down that much

I’ve been lackin’ sleep fer a while now. That’s probably why. I real gotta be more careful…

Lack of sleep?

Yeahh. Lately I’ve been on a roll as an artist

Maybe ’s ‘cause the environment changed, but makin’ art’s been so fun. I forget to eat or sleep an’ just get absorbed in it

“Just a little more”. I keep puttin’ everything else off. Once I start, I can’t stop, an’ before I know it the night’s already over

I see. For you, art’s clearly more than just a hobby

But let me say this. Having something you’re passionate about is wonderful, but cuttin’ into your sleep isn’t a good thing

A bit of sleep deprivation’s fine for a day or two, but when it piles up, it really wears you down

The fatigue you’ve built up w suddenly all hit you at once someday. The body doesn’t lie, y’know

Yeah... I know. That’s why I ended up crashin’ in yer room, Mikejima-senpai

But when I’m at my limit from lack of sleep, that’s exactly when the best ideas come to me

’m st inexperienced. Feels like if I don’t pour my very life into it, I won’t be able to create anything worthwhile…

Mika-san, that’s not right

It’s not because you’re inexperienced that you should burn yourself out. When you’re inexperienced, that’s when you should take care of yourself and move forward little by little

I won’t deny that art born from burning yourself out exists. But people who can keep creating that way? They’re few and far between

Even Shu-san, the one you admire, surely takes proper time to rest

What matters is being able to keep going. Isn’t the important thing how long you can keep bein’ an artist?

I want you to take your time, Mika-san. Value yourself and keep goin’ steadily forward.

Mikejima-senpai…

Thankss. Dunno why, but yer words just really sank in

Words from someone who’s traveled the world really hit different

Hehe, it’s easy enough to say with words

Anyway, when you’re makin’ art in your room, it’s hard to relax when it’s time to rest, right?

If you’d like, feel free to use my room. It’s big, and people from other units sometimes stay over here too

No way, I couldn’t… That’d be way too much to ask

No need to hold back. We help each other out when we’re in trouble, don’t we?

Besides, it feels a bit too luxurious havin’ this whole room to myself

So if someone else makes use of it, I’m grateful too

…I see. If that’s how ya feel, then maybe someday I’ll take you up on it

St, I can’t help feelin’ bad about it. This all started ‘cause of my mistake…

Ah! I know, let me make a little ornament in your image as an apology, Mikkejima-senpai!

An ornament? I don’t really—

Nfufu, the perfect idea just came to me♪

I’ll make it right away, so ya better accept it!

Mika-san!? …And off he goes

I always thought I’d keep this place simple, since I’m not one for decorating…

…Well, one more thing wouldn’t hurt

If I decorate with Mika-san’s kindness, maybe this room will feel a little brighter…♪

Check Other Idol Stories!

Shoe Sores and Aching Muscles
Coffin Dilemma

Translation Notes

  1. ↑ In this case madara it’s not saying ママ (Mama) in katakana as usual, he is saying お母さん (Okaasan) that literally means Mom, Mommy, Ma and of course, Mama

entry.title: Shu Itsuki Birthday 2024
entry.content:
This story wasn't proofread.
See the specific non-proofread story TOS.
I would love to get this proofread someday, if you have interest, contact me on Twitter/X!
Characters
Writer
Happy Elements K.K.
Translation
lukas
Proofreading
Not Proofread
Release
October 30, 2024

I thought you were busy, but I didn't realize you were preparing the things for my birthday.. Well, it's not a bad gift...♪

Birthday Morning - 1

Hm? It looks like I got a message, the sender is…

It was Kagehira after all. I actually don't mind being congratulated like this

I guess I have to say thank you to him in return

Good Morning

Little Girl? Oh, right, come to think of it, you're supposed to be at this photoshoot as well. It's always a good idea to arrive early

It gives you more free time, and allows you to approach work with ease

Happy Birthday!

Non! I'm surprised when someone suddenly calls out to me!

…No, I'm not saying that I'm not happy about the congratulations. I'm grateful for it

Birthday Morning - 2

The shooting is today, I'm wondering how it will be like

It seems like the foyer will be decorated, I'm curious to see if it'll match my expectations on how it will be

In order to get a perfect result in a photoshoot, proper preparation is extremely necessary

Are you feeling in a perfect condition?

You don't even need to ask me, just look at me and you'll see

I take good care of my health, so that my nature beauty is well seen on the camera

I believe that you're right

You understand about that very well, don't you? If that's the case, we can look forward to it

I want to have my image captured in this photo as even when I'm getting one year older, I still shine with a pretty new radiance

Birthday Morning - 3

We ended up talking for a while, so I think it's time to head to the foyey

I'll have enough time to change clothes, and I'd like to check out the set as well

Well, I guess I'll go then

I'm looking forward to it

Ah, since you're here for the photoshoot, you must be watching me closely

Well then, let's meet up again later

Let's do our best!

Ah. Of course, I have no intention of cutting corners

I hope you stand by, and watch confidently like a "Producer" would do

Birthday Shoot Begins

Hmm. I was wondering what the foyer decoration would look like…

Not bad, at all. It's finished in a classy pleasant way to celebrate the birthday

It seems simple but it is actually complex. It makes you feel good

With such a beautifully decorated place, you'll probably be able to take some good photos…♪

Birthday Surprise

Waa!? Who was it that suddenly just poked me in the back?

Hm? It's you, Little Girl. Is there something wrong? That box…

A surprise? I see, lets open the box right away

Oh. Is this suit a birthday present for me? It's not badly designed. I'll gladly receive it

Birthday Suit

What do you think? I tried the suit you gave me

Hmm. I guess you're right. Of course it suits me

By the way… this suit fits me perfectly even though you didn't even take any measurements, that shows off your skills

Well, I'm going to start shooting in this outfit right away

Birthday Shoot in Progress

Hmm. It looks like the shooting is going well

The staff and photographer's reactions were also positive

...This is not only due to my skill, but also to Little Girl's work. The Little Girl is doing an admirable job

Well, I'll try my best to finish the photoshoot like this until the end

Birthday Shooting Ending - 1

Ah, Little Girl. We had a great shoot today. I'm very satisfied

…Hm? Is there something wrong?

Do you want to take a photo to commemorate today? Sure, then let's take one last photo

Birthday Shooting Ending - 2

Well Little Girl, I'm still grateful to you

So, please lend me the photo you just took. I'll sign it

It's a small token of appreciation. I hope you accept it
